graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]

    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

For gitlinks, also reconcile .gitmodules before moving.

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

000/00_oc_overview.md

OpenCode Agent Engine Review Overview

This document analyzes the internal architecture of the opencode repository. OpenCode is an open source AI coding agent based on TypeScript + Bun, and is a server-client separate agent engine built on the Effect-TS layer. The purpose of this analysis, the same as the Codex analysis, is to organize prompt assembly, tool runtime, skills, agent loops, permissions, and plug-in layers where and how they can be ripped out on a code basis.

One-sentence conclusion: OpenCode is a full-stack agent platform that organically combines Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend. Rather than a single CLI tool, it manages multiple project instances simultaneously on a server process and connects desktop, web, and TUI clients through SDK.

The core is six-pronged. First, all services are dependency injected using the Layer/Service/Effect pattern of Effect-TS. Second, the BusEvent.define() + GlobalBus event system simultaneously solves server internal communication and SSE-based client real-time synchronization. Third, the Vercel AI SDK abstracts more than 21 LLM providers into a single streamText interface. Fourth, the Snapshot system implements session-level undo/revert using a separate git repository. Fifth, the Plugin system allows authentication, tools, prompts, and permissions to be expanded externally with more than 25 hook points. Sixth, the Permission system performs detailed access control for each tool and agent using wildcard pattern-based allow/deny/ask rules.

graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context<br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor<br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module<br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service<br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client<br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus<br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
    Config --> PluginSvc["Plugin Service<br/>(25+ hooks)"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message

1. Package structure overview

OpenCode consists of a monorepo based on Bun workspaces.

package Role Technology
packages/140_opencode/ Core Agent Engine (45+ modules) Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK
packages/app/ Web/Desktop Frontend SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS
packages/console/ Cloud Dashboard (SaaS) SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers
packages/desktop/ Tauri desktop shell Tauri, Rust
packages/plugin/ Plugin type definition TypeScript
packages/sdk/ External integration SDK Generated from OpenAPI
packages/ui/ Shared UI Components SolidJS
packages/util/ Shared Utility TypeScript

Main modules in the core engine packages/140_opencode/src/:

module file Role
agent/ agent.ts, prompts Agent definition, 4 types of built-in agents
tool/ 26 files Tool definitions, registry, 24 built-in tools
session/ 17 files Session Management, Processor Loops, Prompt Assembly
provider/ 7 files + SDK LLM Provider Abstraction, 21 Providers
server/ 14 routes Hono HTTP/WebSocket Server
bus/ 3 files Zod type event bus
config/ 6 files 6 level setup hierarchy
permission/ 4 files Pattern matching permission system
skill/ 2 files SKILL.md navigation/loading
mcp/ 4 files MCP Client + OAuth
plugin/ 3 files Plugin Loader + Built-in Authentication
snapshot/ 1 file git-based snapshot/revert
worktree/ 1 file git worktree isolation
lsp/ 5 files Language Server Protocol Integration

2. Effect-TS based service architecture

The biggest structural feature of OpenCode is that all core modules are built with the Service → Layer → Effect pattern of Effect-TS. This pattern handles dependency injection, error handling, and concurrency control in a type-safe manner.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

InstanceState is a key mechanism for isolating state per project instance. When managing multiple projects simultaneously on the same server, the settings, sessions, and tools for each project are initialized independently.

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

3. Agent system

3.1 Agent definition

An agent is defined by the Zod schema and includes name, mode, permissions, model, and prompt.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: Provid

### `000/01_corpus_navigation_map.md`

# Corpus Navigation Map

This repository is a comparative research corpus for coding agents and harnesses. Use this map to decide where to read first without physically moving existing data.

For reversible old-to-new bucket proposals, see `/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/02_corpus_move_candidates.md`.

For the canonical relationship between `/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/` and `/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/`, see `/Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/03_overview_canonical_map.md`.

## Canonical Reading Spine

Physical Rename Rule

Before a folder is moved, add an explicit mapping row using:

old_path -> proposed_path | classification | move_status | evidence

For gitlinks, also reconcile .gitmodules before moving.

Use this when scanning the root directory. Status is intentionally conservative: keep-current means the current path remains the source of truth for now.

`/Users/jun/Developer/codex/.agen

000/03_overview_canonical_map.md

Overview Canonical Map

This map resolves the apparent duplication between /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ without deleting or moving files.

Canonical Rule

  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ is the root overview index and short-entry reading spine.
  • /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ is the deep overview source set.
  • If the same filename exists in both folders and content differs, keep both:
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> first for orientation,
    • read /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> for detailed analysis.
  • If content is identical, treat /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/<name> as the navigation copy and /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/<name> as the deep-overview location until a later link audit decides whether deduplication is safe.

Paired Overview Files

Filename /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000_overview/ bytes /Users/jun/Developer/codex/000/ bytes Equal Rule
00_ag_overview.md 27224 15790 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_ai_overview.md 25716 25716 yes duplicate content; defer dedupe until link audit
00_ay_overview.md 3815 798 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cc_overview.md 25990 27537 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_co_overview.md 41569 17061 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_cp_overview.md 23525 6854 no keep both: orientation plus detail

00_ge_overview.md 47345 35414 no keep both: orientation plus detail

00_ki_overview.md 3360 692 no keep both: orientation plus detail
00_oc_overview.md 43650 33628 no keep both: orientation plus detail

000/00_oc_overview.md

OpenCode 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요

이 문서는 opencode 저장소의 내부 아키텍처를 분석한다. OpenCode는 TypeScript + Bun 기반의 오픈소스 AI 코딩 에이전트로, Effect-TS 계층 위에 구축된 서버-클라이언트 분리형 에이전트 엔진이다. 이번 분석의 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일하게, 프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 에이전트 루프, 권한, 플러그인 계층을 어디서 어떻게 뜯어낼 수 있는지를 코드 기준으로 정리하는 것이다.

한 문장 결론: OpenCode는 Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend가 유기적으로 엮인 풀스택 에이전트 플랫폼이다. 단일 CLI 도구가 아니라, 서버 프로세스 위에서 다수의 프로젝트 인스턴스를 동시에 관리하고, 데스크톱·웹·TUI 클라이언트가 SDK를 통해 접속하는 구조다.

핵심은 여섯 갈래다. 첫째, 모든 서비스가 Effect-TS의 Layer/Service/Effect 패턴으로 의존성 주입된다. 둘째, BusEvent.define() + GlobalBus 이벤트 시스템이 서버 내부 통신과 SSE 기반 클라이언트 실시간 동기화를 동시에 해결한다. 셋째, Vercel AI SDK가 21개 이상의 LLM 프로바이더를 단일 streamText 인터페이스로 추상화한다. 넷째, Snapshot 시스템이 별도 git 저장소를 이용해 세션 단위 undo/revert를 구현한다. 다섯째, Plugin 시스템이 25개 이상의 hook 포인트로 인증·도구·프롬프트·권한을 외부에서 확장 가능하게 한다. 여섯째, Permission 시스템이 wildcard 패턴 기반 allow/deny/ask 규칙으로 도구별·에이전트별 세밀한 접근 제어를 수행한다.

graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context<br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor<br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module<br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service<br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client<br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus<br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
    Config --> PluginSvc["Plugin Service<br/>(25+ hooks)"]

sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자 입력
    participant Server as Hono Server
    participant Session as Session Manager
    participant Processor as SessionProcessor
    participant LLM as LLM (streamText)
    participant Tools as Tool Registry
    participant Perm as Permission Service
    participant Bus as Event Bus

    User->>Server: POST /session/:id/chat
    Server->>Session: chat(sessionID, input)
    Session->>Processor: create + process
    Processor->>LLM: stream(system + messages + tools)
    LLM-->>Processor: streaming chunks
    Processor->>Bus: publish(message.updated)
    Bus-->>User: SSE event

    loop tool calls
        LLM-->>Processor: tool-call event
        Processor->>Perm: evaluate(tool, pattern)
        alt needs approval
            Perm-->>Bus: permission.asked
            Bus-->>User: SSE → approval UI
            User-->>Perm: permission.replied
        end
        Processor->>Tools: execute(tool, args)
        Tools-->>Processor: tool output
        Processor->>LLM: continue with tool result
    end
    Processor->>Session: finalize message

1. 패키지 구조 개요

OpenCode는 Bun workspaces 기반 모노레포로 구성된다.

패키지 역할 기술
packages/140_opencode/ 핵심 에이전트 엔진 (45+ 모듈) Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK
packages/app/ 웹/데스크톱 프론트엔드 SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS
packages/console/ 클라우드 대시보드 (SaaS) SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers
packages/desktop/ Tauri 데스크톱 셸 Tauri, Rust
packages/plugin/ 플러그인 타입 정의 TypeScript
packages/sdk/ 외부 연동 SDK Generated from OpenAPI
packages/ui/ 공유 UI 컴포넌트 SolidJS
packages/util/ 공유 유틸리티 TypeScript

핵심 엔진 packages/140_opencode/src/의 주요 모듈:

모듈 파일 역할
agent/ agent.ts, prompts 에이전트 정의, 빌트인 에이전트 4종
tool/ 26개 파일 도구 정의, 레지스트리, 24개 빌트인 도구
session/ 17개 파일 세션 관리, 프로세서 루프, 프롬프트 조립
provider/ 7개 파일 + SDK LLM 프로바이더 추상화, 21개 프로바이더
server/ 14개 라우트 Hono HTTP/WebSocket 서버
bus/ 3개 파일 Zod 타입 이벤트 버스
config/ 6개 파일 6단계 설정 계층
permission/ 4개 파일 패턴 매칭 권한 시스템
skill/ 2개 파일 SKILL.md 탐색·로딩
mcp/ 4개 파일 MCP 클라이언트 + OAuth
plugin/ 3개 파일 플러그인 로더 + 빌트인 인증
snapshot/ 1개 파일 git 기반 스냅샷/되돌리기
worktree/ 1개 파일 git worktree 격리
lsp/ 5개 파일 언어 서버 프로토콜 통합

2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처

OpenCode의 가장 큰 구조적 특징은 모든 핵심 모듈이 Effect-TS의 Service → Layer → Effect 패턴으로 구축된다는 점이다. 이 패턴은 의존성 주입, 에러 핸들링, 동시성 제어를 타입 안전하게 처리한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

InstanceState는 프로젝트 인스턴스별로 상태를 격리하는 핵심 메커니즘이다. 같은 서버에서 여러 프로젝트를 동시에 관리할 때, 각 프로젝트의 설정·세션·도구가 독립적으로 초기화된다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

3. 에이전트 시스템

3.1 에이전트 정의

에이전트는 Zod 스키마로 정의되며, 이름·모드·권한·모델·프롬프트를 포함한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: Provid
02

Harness at a glance

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

## Corpus note

# OpenCode 에이전트 엔진 검토 개요

이 문서는 `opencode` 저장소의 내부 아키텍처를 분석한다. OpenCode는 TypeScript + Bun 기반의 오픈소스 AI 코딩 에이전트로, Effect-TS 계층 위에 구축된 서버-클라이언트 분리형 에이전트 엔진이다. 이번 분석의 목적은 Codex 분석과 동일하게, 프롬프트 조립, 툴 런타임, 스킬, 에이전트 루프, 권한, 플러그인 계층을 **어디서 어떻게 뜯어낼 수 있는지**를 코드 기준으로 정리하는 것이다.

한 문장 결론: OpenCode는 `Effect-TS service layer + Hono HTTP server + Vercel AI SDK + Zod-typed event bus + SolidJS frontend`가 유기적으로 엮인 풀스택 에이전트 플랫폼이다. 단일 CLI 도구가 아니라, 서버 프로세스 위에서 다수의 프로젝트 인스턴스를 동시에 관리하고, 데스크톱·웹·TUI 클라이언트가 SDK를 통해 접속하는 구조다.

핵심은 여섯 갈래다. 첫째, 모든 서비스가 Effect-TS의 `Layer`/`Service`/`Effect` 패턴으로 의존성 주입된다. 둘째, `BusEvent.define()` + `GlobalBus` 이벤트 시스템이 서버 내부 통신과 SSE 기반 클라이언트 실시간 동기화를 동시에 해결한다. 셋째, Vercel AI SDK가 21개 이상의 LLM 프로바이더를 단일 `streamText` 인터페이스로 추상화한다. 넷째, `Snapshot` 시스템이 별도 git 저장소를 이용해 세션 단위 undo/revert를 구현한다. 다섯째, `Plugin` 시스템이 25개 이상의 hook 포인트로 인증·도구·프롬프트·권한을 외부에서 확장 가능하게 한다. 여섯째, `Permission` 시스템이 wildcard 패턴 기반 `allow/deny/ask` 규칙으로 도구별·에이전트별 세밀한 접근 제어를 수행한다.

```mermaid
graph TD
    CLI["CLI (yargs)"] --> Server["Hono HTTP Server"]
    Server --> Instance["Instance Context<br/>(per-project)"]
    Instance --> Session["Session Manager"]
    Instance --> Agent["Agent Service"]
    Instance --> Config["Config Loader"]
    Instance --> Snapshot["Snapshot (git)"]
    Session --> Processor["SessionProcessor<br/>(agent loop)"]
    Processor --> LLM["LLM Module<br/>(Vercel AI SDK)"]
    Processor --> ToolRegistry["Tool Registry"]
    Processor --> PermSvc["Permission Service"]
    LLM --> Provider["Provider Service<br/>(21+ providers)"]
    ToolRegistry --> BuiltinTools["24 Built-in Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> MCPTools["MCP Bridge Tools"]
    ToolRegistry --> PluginTools["Plugin Tools"]
    MCPTools --> MCPClient["MCP Client<br/>(stdio/SSE/HTTP)"]
    Instance --> Bus["Event Bus"]
    Bus --> GlobalBus["GlobalBus<br/>(EventEmitter)"]
    GlobalBus --> SSE["SSE to Frontend"]
    SSE --> AppFE["SolidJS App"]
    SSE --> ConsoleFE["SolidStart Console"]
    Agent --> SkillSvc["Skill Service"]
 

## Main analysis

## Corpus axis index

| Axis | Doc |
| --- | --- |
| 001 TUI | `001_tui-design/01_oc_tui.md` |
| 002 Prompt | `002_prompt-context/02_oc_prompt.md` |

05

Agent workflow

Agent workflow

Overview

Agent workflow — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • Daily edit, tool, and commit loop for this harness.

  • 140_opencode/README.md

  • Interactive TUI: Built with Bubble Tea for a smooth terminal experience
  • Multiple AI Providers: Support for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and OpenRouter
  • Session Management: Save and manage multiple conversation sessions
  • Tool Integration: AI can execute commands, search files, and modify code
  • Vim-like Editor: Integrated editor with text input capabilities
  • Persistent Storage: SQLite database for storing conversations and sessions
  • LSP Integration: Language Server Protocol support for code intelligence
  • File Change Tracking: Track and visualize file changes during sessions
  • External Editor Support: Open your preferred editor for composing messages
  • Named Arguments for Custom Commands: Create powerful custom commands with multiple named placeholders

Topics covered

  • Agent workflow
  • Features

Source snippets

140_opencode/README.md

Installation

Using the Install Script



## Main analysis

The daily edit/tool/commit loop for this harness.

> `140_opencode/README.md`

## Features

- **Interactive TUI**: Built with [Bubble Tea](https://github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea) for a smooth terminal experience
- **Multiple AI Providers**: Support for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and OpenRouter
- **Session Management**: Save and manage multiple conversation sessions
- **Tool Integration**: AI can execute commands, search files, and modify code
- **Vim-like Editor**: Integrated editor with text input capabilities
- **Persistent Storage**: SQLite database for storing conversations and sessions
- **LSP Integration**: Language Server Protocol support for code intelligence
- **File Change Tracking**: Track and visualize file changes during sessions
- **External Editor Support**: Open your preferred editor for composing messages
- **Named Arguments for Custom Commands**: Create powerful custom commands with multiple named placeholders

## OpenCode session loop

SessionProcessor → plugin hooks → GlobalBus.

> `000_overview/00_oc_overview.md`

이 하네스의 일상적인 편집·도구·커밋 루프.

> `140_opencode/README.md`

## Features

- **Interactive TUI**: Built with [Bubble Tea](https://github.com/charmbracelet/bubbletea) for a smooth terminal experience
- **Multiple AI Providers**: Support for OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, AWS Bedrock, Groq, Azure OpenAI, and OpenRouter
- **Session Management**: Save and manage multiple conversation sessions
- **Tool Integration**: AI can execute commands, search files, and modify code
- **Vim-like Editor**: Integrated editor with text input capabilities
- **Persistent Storage**: SQLite database for storing conversations and sessions
- **LSP Integration**: Language Server Protocol support for code intelligence
- **File Change Tracking**: Track and visualize file changes during sessions
- **External Editor Support**: Open your preferred editor for composing messages
- **Named Arguments for Custom Commands**: Create powerful custom commands with multiple named placeholders

## OpenCode 세션 루프

SessionProcessor → plugin hooks → GlobalBus.

Config & models

Config & models

Overview

Config & models — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • CLI flags, environment, and project config layers.

  • 140_opencode/README.md

  • OpenCode looks for configuration in the following locations:
  • $HOME/.opencode.json
  • $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/.opencode.json
  • ./.opencode.json (local directory)
  • OpenCode includes an auto compact feature that automatically summarizes your conversation when it approaches the model's context window limit. When enabled (default setting), this feature:
  • Monitors token usage during your conversation
  • Automatically triggers summarization when usage reaches 95% of the model's context window
  • Creates a new session with the summary, allowing you to continue your work without losing context
  • Helps prevent "out of context" errors that can occur with long conversations
  • You can enable or disable this feature in your configuration file:

  • Config & models

      "env": [],
      "args": []

  },
  "lsp": {
    "go": {
      "disabled": false,
      "command": "gopls"
    }
  },
  "debug": false,
  "debugLSP": false,
  "autoCompact": true
}

Main analysis

CLI/env/project settings file hierarchy.

140_opencode/README.md

Configuration

OpenCode looks for configuration in the following locations:

  • $HOME/.opencode.json
  • $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/.opencode.json
  • ./.opencode.json (local directory)

Auto Compact Feature

OpenCode includes an auto compact feature that automatically summarizes your conversation when it approaches the model's context window limit. When enabled (default setting), this feature:

  • Monitors token usage during your conversation
  • Automatically triggers summarization when usage reaches 95% of the model's context window
  • Creates a new session with the summary, allowing you to continue your work without losing context
  • Helps prevent "out of context" errors that can occur with long conversations

You can enable or disable this feature in your configuration file:

{
  "autoCompact": true // default is true
}

Environment Variables

You can configure OpenCode using environment variables:

Environment Variable Purpose
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY For Claude models
OPENAI_API_KEY For OpenAI models
GEMINI_API_KEY For Google Gemini models
GITHUB_TOKEN For Github Copilot models (see Using Github Copilot)
VERTEXAI_PROJECT For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)
VERTEXAI_LOCATION For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)
GROQ_API_KEY For Groq models
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AWS_REGION For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT For Azure OpenAI models
AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY For Azure OpenAI models (optional when using Entra ID)
AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION For Azure OpenAI models
LOCAL_ENDPOINT For self-hosted models
SHELL Default shell to use (if not specified in config)

Shell Configuration

OpenCode allows you to configure the shell used by the bash tool. By default, it uses the shell specified in the SHELL environment variable, or falls back to /bin/bash if not set.

You can override this in your configuration file:

{
  "shell": {
    "path": "/bin/zsh",
    "args": ["-l"]
  }
}

This is useful if you want to use a different shell than your default system shell, or if you need to pass specific arguments to the shell.

Configuration File Structure

{
  "data": {
    "directory": ".opencode"
  },
  "providers": {
    "openai": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "anthropic": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "copilot": {
      "disabled": false
    },
    "groq": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "openrouter": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    }
  },
  "agents": {
    "coder": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000
    },
    "task": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000
    },
    "title": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 80
    }
  },
  "shell": {
    "path": "/bin/bash",
    "args": ["-l"]
  },
  "mcpServers": {
    "example": {
      "type": "stdio",
      "command": "path/to/mcp-server",
      "env": [],
      "args": []
    }
  },
  "lsp": {
    "go": {
      "disabled": false,
      "command": "gopls"
    }
  },
  "debug": false,
  "debugLSP": false,
  "autoCompact": true
}

Korean corpus (reference)

설정 & 모델

CLI / env / 프로젝트 설정 파일 계층.

140_opencode/README.md

Configuration

OpenCode looks for configuration in the following locations:

  • $HOME/.opencode.json
  • $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/opencode/.opencode.json
  • ./.opencode.json (local directory)

Auto Compact Feature

OpenCode includes an auto compact feature that automatically summarizes your conversation when it approaches the model's context window limit. When enabled (default setting), this feature:

  • Monitors token usage during your conversation
  • Automatically triggers summarization when usage reaches 95% of the model's context window
  • Creates a new session with the summary, allowing you to continue your work without losing context
  • Helps prevent "out of context" errors that can occur with long conversations

You can enable or disable this feature in your configuration file:

{
  "autoCompact": true // default is true
}

Environment Variables

You can configure OpenCode using environment variables:

Environment Variable Purpose
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY For Claude models
OPENAI_API_KEY For OpenAI models
GEMINI_API_KEY For Google Gemini models
GITHUB_TOKEN For Github Copilot models (see Using Github Copilot)
VERTEXAI_PROJECT For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)
VERTEXAI_LOCATION For Google Cloud VertexAI (Gemini)
GROQ_API_KEY For Groq models
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AWS_REGION For AWS Bedrock (Claude)
AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT For Azure OpenAI models
AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY For Azure OpenAI models (optional when using Entra ID)
AZURE_OPENAI_API_VERSION For Azure OpenAI models
LOCAL_ENDPOINT For self-hosted models
SHELL Default shell to use (if not specified in config)

Shell Configuration

OpenCode allows you to configure the shell used by the bash tool. By default, it uses the shell specified in the SHELL environment variable, or falls back to /bin/bash if not set.

You can override this in your configuration file:

{
  "shell": {
    "path": "/bin/zsh",
    "args": ["-l"]
  }
}

This is useful if you want to use a different shell than your default system shell, or if you need to pass specific arguments to the shell.

Configuration File Structure

{
  "data": {
    "directory": ".opencode"
  },
  "providers": {
    "openai": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "anthropic": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "copilot": {
      "disabled": false
    },
    "groq": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    },
    "openrouter": {
      "apiKey": "your-api-key",
      "disabled": false
    }
  },
  "agents": {
    "coder": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000
    },
    "task": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 5000
    },
    "title": {
      "model": "claude-3.7-sonnet",
      "maxTokens": 80
    }
  },
  "shell": {
    "path": "/bin/bash",
    "args": ["-l"]
  },
  "mcpServers": {
    "example": {
      "type": "stdio",
      "command": "path/to/mcp-server",
      "env": [],
      "args": []
    }
  },
  "lsp": {
    "go": {
      "disabled": false,
      "command": "gopls"
    }
  },
  "debug": false,
  "debugLSP": false,
  "autoCompact": true
}

Overview §1

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

Overview

Overview §1 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • OpenCode는 Bun workspaces 기반 모노레포로 구성된다.
  • | 패키지 | 역할 | 기술 |
  • | packages/140_opencode/ | 핵심 에이전트 엔진 (45+ 모듈) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |
  • | packages/app/ | 웹/데스크톱 프론트엔드 | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |
  • | packages/console/ | 클라우드 대시보드 (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |
  • | packages/desktop/ | Tauri 데스크톱 셸 | Tauri, Rust |
  • | packages/plugin/ | 플러그인 타입 정의 | TypeScript |
  • | packages/sdk/ | 외부 연동 SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |
  • | packages/ui/ | 공유 UI 컴포넌트 | SolidJS |
  • | packages/util/ | 공유 유틸리티 | TypeScript |
  • 핵심 엔진 packages/140_opencode/src/의 주요 모듈:
  • | 모듈 | 파일 | 역할 |

Topics covered

    1. 패키지 구조 개요
    1. 패키지 구조 개요

Source code snippets

140_opencode/README.md

Installation

Using the Install Script



## Main analysis

## 1. Package structure overview

## 1. Package structure overview

OpenCode consists of a monorepo based on Bun workspaces.

| package | Role | Technology |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `packages/140_opencode/` | Core Agent Engine (45+ modules) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |
| `packages/app/` | Web/Desktop Frontend | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |
| `packages/console/` | Cloud Dashboard (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |
| `packages/desktop/` | Tauri desktop shell | Tauri, Rust |
| `packages/plugin/` | Plugin type definition | TypeScript |
| `packages/sdk/` | External integration SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |
| `packages/ui/` | Shared UI Components | SolidJS |
| `packages/util/` | Shared Utility | TypeScript |

Main modules in the core engine `packages/140_opencode/src/`:

| module | file | Role |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `agent/` | `agent.ts`, prompts | Agent definition, 4 types of built-in agents |
| `tool/` | 26 files | Tool definitions, registry, 24 built-in tools |
| `session/` | 17 files | Session Management, Processor Loops, Prompt Assembly |
| `provider/` | 7 files + SDK | LLM Provider Abstraction, 21 Providers |
| `server/` | 14 routes | Hono HTTP/WebSocket Server |
| `bus/` | 3 files | Zod type event bus |
| `config/` | 6 files | 6 level setup hierarchy |
| `permission/` | 4 files | Pattern matching permission system |
| `skill/` | 2 files | SKILL.md navigation/loading |
| `mcp/` | 4 files | MCP Client + OAuth |
| `plugin/` | 3 files | Plugin Loader + Built-in Authentication |
| `snapshot/` | 1 file | git-based snapshot/revert |
| `worktree/` | 1 file | git worktree isolation |
| `lsp/` | 5 files | Language Server Protocol Integration |

---

## Korean corpus (reference)

> Verbatim KO corpus `000_overview/00_oc_overview.md` for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

## 1. 패키지 구조 개요

## 1. 패키지 구조 개요

OpenCode는 Bun workspaces 기반 모노레포로 구성된다.

| 패키지 | 역할 | 기술 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `packages/140_opencode/` | 핵심 에이전트 엔진 (45+ 모듈) | Bun, Effect-TS, Hono, Vercel AI SDK |
| `packages/app/` | 웹/데스크톱 프론트엔드 | SolidJS, Vite, TailwindCSS |
| `packages/console/` | 클라우드 대시보드 (SaaS) | SolidStart, Nitro, Cloudflare Workers |
| `packages/desktop/` | Tauri 데스크톱 셸 | Tauri, Rust |
| `packages/plugin/` | 플러그인 타입 정의 | TypeScript |
| `packages/sdk/` | 외부 연동 SDK | Generated from OpenAPI |
| `packages/ui/` | 공유 UI 컴포넌트 | SolidJS |
| `packages/util/` | 공유 유틸리티 | TypeScript |

핵심 엔진 `packages/140_opencode/src/`의 주요 모듈:

| 모듈 | 파일 | 역할 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `agent/` | `agent.ts`, prompts | 에이전트 정의, 빌트인 에이전트 4종 |
| `tool/` | 26개 파일 | 도구 정의, 레지스트리, 24개 빌트인 도구 |
| `session/` | 17개 파일 | 세션 관리, 프로세서 루프, 프롬프트 조립 |
| `provider/` | 7개 파일 + SDK | LLM 프로바이더 추상화, 21개 프로바이더 |
| `server/` | 14개 라우트 | Hono HTTP/WebSocket 서버 |
| `bus/` | 3개 파일 | Zod 타입 이벤트 버스 |
| `config/` | 6개 파일 | 6단계 설정 계층 |
| `permission/` | 4개 파일 | 패턴 매칭 권한 시스템 |
| `skill/` | 2개 파일 | SKILL.md 탐색·로딩 |
| `mcp/` | 4개 파일 | MCP 클라이언트 + OAuth |
| `plugin/` | 3개 파일 | 플러그인 로더 + 빌트인 인증 |
| `snapshot/` | 1개 파일 | git 기반 스냅샷/되돌리기 |
| `worktree/` | 1개 파일 | git worktree 격리 |
| `lsp/` | 5개 파일 | 언어 서버 프로토콜 통합 |

---
08

Overview §2

DEV

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

Overview

Overview §2 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • OpenCode의 가장 큰 구조적 특징은 모든 핵심 모듈이 Effect-TS의 Service → Layer → Effect 패턴으로 구축된다는 점이다. 이 패턴은 의존성 주입, 에러 핸들링, 동시성 제어를 타입 안전하게 처리한다.
  • // packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
  • export interface Interface {
  • readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  • readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  • readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect
  • }
  • export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}
  • export const layer = Layer.effect(
  • Service,
  • Effect.gen(function* () {
  • const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())

Topics covered

    1. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 Architecture
    1. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 Architecture

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

Main analysis

2. Effect-TS based service architecture

2. Effect-TS based service architecture

The biggest structural feature of OpenCode is that all core modules are built with the Service → Layer → Effect pattern of Effect-TS. This pattern handles dependency injection, error handling, and concurrency control in a type-safe manner.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

InstanceState is a key mechanism for isolating state per project instance. When managing multiple projects simultaneously on the same server, the settings, sessions, and tools for each project are initialized independently.

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처

2. Effect-TS 기반 서비스 아키텍처

OpenCode의 가장 큰 구조적 특징은 모든 핵심 모듈이 Effect-TS의 Service → Layer → Effect 패턴으로 구축된다는 점이다. 이 패턴은 의존성 주입, 에러 핸들링, 동시성 제어를 타입 안전하게 처리한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export interface Interface {
  readonly get: (agent: string) => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info>
  readonly list: () => Effect.Effect<Agent.Info[]>
  readonly defaultAgent: () => Effect.Effect<string>
}

export class Service extends ServiceMap.Service<Service, Interface>()("@opencode/Agent") {}

export const layer = Layer.effect(
  Service,
  Effect.gen(function* () {
    const config = () => Effect.promise(() => Config.get())
    // ... build agent registry
    return Service.of({ get, list, defaultAgent })
  }),
)

InstanceState는 프로젝트 인스턴스별로 상태를 격리하는 핵심 메커니즘이다. 같은 서버에서 여러 프로젝트를 동시에 관리할 때, 각 프로젝트의 설정·세션·도구가 독립적으로 초기화된다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/effect/instance-state.ts
// 프로젝트(디렉토리)별 독립 상태 관리
const state = yield* InstanceState.make<State>(
  Effect.fn("Agent.state")(function* (ctx) {
    // ctx.directory, ctx.worktree 등 인스턴스 컨텍스트 접근
    return { get, list, defaultAgent }
  }),
)
09

  • // packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts

  • hidden: z.boolean().optional(),

    1. Agent 시스템

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
{
  name: "plan",
  mode: "primary",
  permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
    question: "allow",
    plan_exit: "allow",
    edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
  }), user),
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts — 사용자 설정 병합
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(cfg.agent ?? {})) {
  if (value.disable) { delete agents[key]; continue }
  let item = agents[key] ?? {
    name: key, mode: "all",
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, user),
    options: {}, native: false,
  }
  item.model = Provider.parseModel(value.model)
  item.prompt = value.prompt ?? item.prompt
}

Main analysis

3. Agent system

3. Agent system

3.1 Agent definition

An agent is defined by the Zod schema and includes name, mode, permissions, model, and prompt.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})

3.2 4 types of built-in agents

agent mode Role
build primary Default execution agent. All tools available
plan primary Read-only planning agent. Block editing tools
general subagent Versatile parallel operations. Excluding only the todo tool
explore subagent Specialized in code navigation. Only grep/glob/read/bash allowed

The permission settings for the plan agent are interesting. deny all editing, with the exception of .opencode/plans/*.md:

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
{
  name: "plan",
  mode: "primary",
  permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
    question: "allow",
    plan_exit: "allow",
    edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
  }), user),
}

3.3 Custom Agent

You can add agents or override existing agents in the configuration file:

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts — 사용자 설정 병합
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(cfg.agent ?? {})) {
  if (value.disable) { delete agents[key]; continue }
  let item = agents[key] ?? {
    name: key, mode: "all",
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, user),
    options: {}, native: false,
  }
  item.model = Provider.parseModel(value.model)
  item.prompt = value.prompt ?? item.prompt
}

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

3. 에이전트 시스템

3. 에이전트 시스템

3.1 에이전트 정의

에이전트는 Zod 스키마로 정의되며, 이름·모드·권한·모델·프롬프트를 포함한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
export const Info = z.object({
  name: z.string(),
  mode: z.enum(["subagent", "primary", "all"]),
  native: z.boolean().optional(),
  hidden: z.boolean().optional(),
  permission: Permission.Ruleset,
  model: z.object({
    modelID: ModelID.zod,
    providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  }).optional(),
  prompt: z.string().optional(),
  steps: z.number().int().positive().optional(),
})

3.2 빌트인 에이전트 4종

에이전트 모드 역할
build primary 기본 실행 에이전트. 모든 도구 사용 가능
plan primary 읽기 전용 계획 에이전트. 편집 도구 차단
general subagent 다목적 병렬 작업. todo 도구만 제외
explore subagent 코드 탐색 전문. grep/glob/read/bash만 허용

plan 에이전트의 권한 설정이 흥미롭다. 모든 편집을 deny하되 .opencode/plans/*.md만 예외적으로 허용한다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts
{
  name: "plan",
  mode: "primary",
  permission: Permission.merge(defaults, Permission.fromConfig({
    question: "allow",
    plan_exit: "allow",
    edit: { "*": "deny", ".opencode/plans/*.md": "allow" },
  }), user),
}

3.3 사용자 정의 에이전트

설정 파일에서 에이전트를 추가하거나 기존 에이전트를 재정의할 수 있다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/agent/agent.ts — 사용자 설정 병합
for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(cfg.agent ?? {})) {
  if (value.disable) { delete agents[key]; continue }
  let item = agents[key] ?? {
    name: key, mode: "all",
    permission: Permission.merge(defaults, user),
    options: {}, native: false,
  }
  item.model = Provider.parseModel(value.model)
  item.prompt = value.prompt ?? item.prompt
}
10

Overview §4

DEV

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

Overview

Overview §4 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • SessionProcessor가 에이전트 실행 루프의 핵심이다. while(true) 루프 안에서 LLM 스트림을 받아 도구 호출을 처리하고, 도구 결과를 다시 LLM에 넘기는 사이클을 반복한다.
  • // packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
  • export function create(input: {
  • assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  • sessionID: SessionID
  • model: Provider.Model
  • abort: AbortSignal
  • }) {
  • const toolcalls: Record<string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  • let attempt = 0
  • return {
  • async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {

Topics covered

    1. 세션 프로세서와 Agent Loop
    1. 세션 프로세서와 Agent Loop

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record<string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}

Main analysis

4. Session processor and agent loop

4. Session processor and agent loop

SessionProcessor is the core of the agent execution loop. Inside the while(true) loop, the cycle of receiving the LLM stream, processing the tool call, and passing the tool results back to the LLM is repeated.

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record<string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}

Doom loop defense: Automatically blocks when the same tool call is repeated 3 times (DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD = 3).

Context Compression: SessionCompaction automatically summarizes conversations when token limits are exceeded.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

4. 세션 프로세서와 에이전트 루프

4. 세션 프로세서와 에이전트 루프

SessionProcessor가 에이전트 실행 루프의 핵심이다. while(true) 루프 안에서 LLM 스트림을 받아 도구 호출을 처리하고, 도구 결과를 다시 LLM에 넘기는 사이클을 반복한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/processor.ts
export function create(input: {
  assistantMessage: MessageV2.Assistant
  sessionID: SessionID
  model: Provider.Model
  abort: AbortSignal
}) {
  const toolcalls: Record<string, MessageV2.ToolPart> = {}
  let attempt = 0

  return {
    async process(streamInput: LLM.StreamInput) {
      while (true) {  // ← 에이전트 루프
        const stream = await LLM.stream(streamInput)
        for await (const value of stream.fullStream) {
          input.abort.throwIfAborted()
          switch (value.type) {
            case "tool-call":
              // doom loop 감지 (동일 호출 3회 반복 시 차단)
              // 권한 확인 → 도구 실행 → 결과 수집
              break
            case "text-delta":
              // 스트리밍 텍스트 업데이트
              break
            case "reasoning-start":
              // 추론 과정 추적
              break
          }
        }
        // 도구 호출이 있으면 루프 계속, 없으면 종료
        if (noToolCalls) break
      }
    },
  }
}

Doom loop 방어: 동일한 도구 호출이 3회 반복되면 자동 차단한다 (DOOM_LOOP_THRESHOLD = 3).

컨텍스트 압축: 토큰 한도 초과 시 SessionCompaction이 자동으로 대화를 요약한다.

11

Overview §5

  • if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
  • if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
  • return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]

  • return [You are powered by ${model.api.id},
  • <env>,
  • Working directory: ${Instance.directory},

Topics covered

    1. Prompt 조립 구조
    1. Prompt 조립 구조

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/system.ts
export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
  }

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
    return [`You are powered by ${model.api.id}`,
      `<env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `</env>`].join("\n")
  }
}

Main analysis

5. Prompt assembly structure

5. Prompt assembly structure

System prompts are branched by model, and environmental information and skill lists are added.

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/system.ts
export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
  }

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
    return [`You are powered by ${model.api.id}`,
      `<env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `</env>`].join("\n")
  }
}

Prompt assembly sequence:

  1. Default system prompts by model (prompt/anthropic.txt, prompt/codex.txt, etc.)
  2. Environment information (working directory, platform, date)
  3. Skill list (filtered by agent permissions)
  4. User instructions (configuration file + .opencode/ directory)
  5. Plugin Transformation (experimental.chat.system.transform hook)

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

5. 프롬프트 조립 구조

5. 프롬프트 조립 구조

시스템 프롬프트는 모델별로 분기되며, 환경 정보와 스킬 목록이 추가된다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/session/system.ts
export namespace SystemPrompt {
  export function provider(model: Provider.Model) {
    if (model.api.id.includes("claude")) return [PROMPT_ANTHROPIC]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gpt")) return [PROMPT_CODEX]
    if (model.api.id.includes("gemini-")) return [PROMPT_GEMINI]
    return [PROMPT_DEFAULT]
  }

  export async function environment(model: Provider.Model) {
    return [`You are powered by ${model.api.id}`,
      `<env>`,
      `  Working directory: ${Instance.directory}`,
      `  Platform: ${process.platform}`,
      `  Today's date: ${new Date().toDateString()}`,
      `</env>`].join("\n")
  }
}

프롬프트 조립 순서:

  1. 모델별 기본 시스템 프롬프트 (prompt/anthropic.txt, prompt/codex.txt 등)
  2. 환경 정보 (작업 디렉토리, 플랫폼, 날짜)
  3. 스킬 목록 (에이전트 권한에 따라 필터링)
  4. 사용자 instructions (설정 파일 + .opencode/ 디렉토리)
  5. 플러그인 변형 (experimental.chat.system.transform 훅)
12

Overview §6

DEV

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

Overview

Overview §6 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 모든 도구는 Tool.define() 헬퍼로 정의된다. init 함수가 에이전트 컨텍스트를 받아 파라미터 스키마와 실행 함수를 반환한다.
  • // packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
  • export interface Info<Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  • id: string
  • init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise<{
  • description: string
  • parameters: Parameters
  • execute(args: z.infer, ctx: Context): Promise<{
  • title: string
  • metadata: M
  • output: string
  • attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]

Topics covered

    1. Tool Runtime
    1. Tool Runtime
  • 6.1 Tool 정의 패턴
  • 6.2 Tool 레지스트리
  • 6.3 빌트인 Tool 24종

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export interface Info<Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  id: string
  init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise<{
    description: string
    parameters: Parameters
    execute(args: z.infer<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Promise<{
      title: string
      metadata: M
      output: string
      attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]
    }>
  }>
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
async function all(custom: Tool.Info[]): Promise<Tool.Info[]> {
  return [
    BashTool, ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool, EditTool, WriteTool,
    TaskTool, WebFetchTool, TodoWriteTool, WebSearchTool, CodeSearchTool,
    SkillTool, ApplyPatchTool,
    ...(Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL ? [LspTool] : []),
    ...custom,  // 플러그인 도구
  ]
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts — Tool.Context
export type Context = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: any }): void
  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise<void>
}

Main analysis

6. Tool runtime

6. Tool runtime

6.1 Tool definition pattern

All tools are defined with the Tool.define() helper. The init function receives the agent context and returns a parameter schema and execution function.

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export interface Info<Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  id: string
  init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise<{
    description: string
    parameters: Parameters
    execute(args: z.infer<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Promise<{
      title: string
      metadata: M
      output: string
      attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]
    }>
  }>
}

6.2 Tool Registry

ToolRegistry integrates and manages built-in tools and plug-in tools. The toolset changes dynamically depending on the model (apply_patch for GPT-5+, edit/write for the others).

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
async function all(custom: Tool.Info[]): Promise<Tool.Info[]> {
  return [
    BashTool, ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool, EditTool, WriteTool,
    TaskTool, WebFetchTool, TodoWriteTool, WebSearchTool, CodeSearchTool,
    SkillTool, ApplyPatchTool,
    ...(Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL ? [LspTool] : []),
    ...custom,  // 플러그인 도구
  ]
}

6.3 24 built-in tools

Category tools
File I/O read, edit, write, glob, grep, ls, apply_patch, multiedit
Run bash
Search websearch, codesearch, webfetch
agent task (execute subagent), skill (load skill), question (user question)
Management todo (TODO management), plan (switch planning mode), batch (batch execution)
Development lsp (language server, experimental)

6.4 Tool execution context

When running a tool, permission checks (ask), metadata reporting (metadata), and abort signals (abort) are injected into the context:

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts — Tool.Context
export type Context = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: any }): void
  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise<void>
}

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

6. 도구 런타임

6. 도구 런타임

6.1 도구 정의 패턴

모든 도구는 Tool.define() 헬퍼로 정의된다. init 함수가 에이전트 컨텍스트를 받아 파라미터 스키마와 실행 함수를 반환한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts
export interface Info<Parameters extends z.ZodType, M extends Metadata> {
  id: string
  init: (ctx?: InitContext) => Promise<{
    description: string
    parameters: Parameters
    execute(args: z.infer<Parameters>, ctx: Context): Promise<{
      title: string
      metadata: M
      output: string
      attachments?: Omit<MessageV2.FilePart, "id" | "sessionID" | "messageID">[]
    }>
  }>
}

6.2 도구 레지스트리

ToolRegistry는 빌트인 도구와 플러그인 도구를 통합 관리한다. 모델에 따라 도구 집합이 동적으로 변경된다 (GPT-5+는 apply_patch, 나머지는 edit/write).

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts
async function all(custom: Tool.Info[]): Promise<Tool.Info[]> {
  return [
    BashTool, ReadTool, GlobTool, GrepTool, EditTool, WriteTool,
    TaskTool, WebFetchTool, TodoWriteTool, WebSearchTool, CodeSearchTool,
    SkillTool, ApplyPatchTool,
    ...(Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_LSP_TOOL ? [LspTool] : []),
    ...custom,  // 플러그인 도구
  ]
}

6.3 빌트인 도구 24종

범주 도구
파일 I/O read, edit, write, glob, grep, ls, apply_patch, multiedit
실행 bash
검색 websearch, codesearch, webfetch
에이전트 task (서브에이전트 실행), skill (스킬 로드), question (사용자 질문)
관리 todo (TODO 관리), plan (계획 모드 전환), batch (배치 실행)
개발 lsp (언어 서버, 실험적)

6.4 도구 실행 컨텍스트

도구 실행 시 권한 확인(ask), 메타데이터 보고(metadata), 중단 신호(abort)가 컨텍스트로 주입된다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/tool.ts — Tool.Context
export type Context = {
  sessionID: SessionID
  messageID: MessageID
  agent: string
  abort: AbortSignal
  messages: MessageV2.WithParts[]
  metadata(input: { title?: string; metadata?: any }): void
  ask(input: Omit<Permission.Request, "id" | "sessionID" | "tool">): Promise<void>
}
13

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts
const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record<string, (options: any) => SDK> = {
  "@ai-sdk/anthropic": createAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/openai": createOpenAI,
  "@ai-sdk/google": createGoogleGenerativeAI,
  "@ai-sdk/azure": createAzure,
  "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": createAmazonBedrock,
  "@ai-sdk/xai": createXai,
  "@ai-sdk/mistral": createMistral,

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts — Model 스키마
export const Model = z.object({
  id: ModelID.zod,
  providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  capabilities: z.object({
    temperature: z.boolean(),
    reasoning: z.boolean(),
    attachment: z.boolean(),
    toolcall: z.boolean(),
    input: z.object({ text: z.boolean(), image: z.boolean(), pdf: z.boolean() }),
  }),
  cost: z.object({
    input: z.number(),   // $/1K tokens
    output: z.number(),
  }),
  limit: z.object({
    context: z.number(),  // context window
    output: z.number(),   // max output tokens
  }),
})

Main analysis

7. Provider system

7. Provider system

7.1 Vercel AI SDK-based abstraction

Integrates more than 21 LLM providers into the @ai-sdk/* package:

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts
const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record<string, (options: any) => SDK> = {
  "@ai-sdk/anthropic": createAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/openai": createOpenAI,
  "@ai-sdk/google": createGoogleGenerativeAI,
  "@ai-sdk/azure": createAzure,
  "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": createAmazonBedrock,
  "@ai-sdk/xai": createXai,
  "@ai-sdk/mistral": createMistral,
  "@ai-sdk/groq": createGroq,
  "@openrouter/ai-sdk-provider": createOpenRouter,
  // ... 12개 더
}

7.2 Model metadata

Each model explicitly declares its capabilities, costs, and limitations:

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts — Model 스키마
export const Model = z.object({
  id: ModelID.zod,
  providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  capabilities: z.object({
    temperature: z.boolean(),
    reasoning: z.boolean(),
    attachment: z.boolean(),
    toolcall: z.boolean(),
    input: z.object({ text: z.boolean(), image: z.boolean(), pdf: z.boolean() }),
  }),
  cost: z.object({
    input: z.number(),   // $/1K tokens
    output: z.number(),
  }),
  limit: z.object({
    context: z.number(),  // context window
    output: z.number(),   // max output tokens
  }),
})

7.3 Authentication resolution order

  1. Environment variables (OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.)
  2. Auth Store (OAuth token)
  3. Plugin authentication loader (Codex OAuth, Copilot OAuth)
  4. Configuration file
  5. .well-known/opencode remote configuration

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

7. 프로바이더 시스템

7. 프로바이더 시스템

7.1 Vercel AI SDK 기반 추상화

21개 이상의 LLM 프로바이더를 @ai-sdk/* 패키지로 통합한다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts
const BUNDLED_PROVIDERS: Record<string, (options: any) => SDK> = {
  "@ai-sdk/anthropic": createAnthropic,
  "@ai-sdk/openai": createOpenAI,
  "@ai-sdk/google": createGoogleGenerativeAI,
  "@ai-sdk/azure": createAzure,
  "@ai-sdk/amazon-bedrock": createAmazonBedrock,
  "@ai-sdk/xai": createXai,
  "@ai-sdk/mistral": createMistral,
  "@ai-sdk/groq": createGroq,
  "@openrouter/ai-sdk-provider": createOpenRouter,
  // ... 12개 더
}

7.2 모델 메타데이터

각 모델은 능력(capability), 비용, 제한을 명시적으로 선언한다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts — Model 스키마
export const Model = z.object({
  id: ModelID.zod,
  providerID: ProviderID.zod,
  capabilities: z.object({
    temperature: z.boolean(),
    reasoning: z.boolean(),
    attachment: z.boolean(),
    toolcall: z.boolean(),
    input: z.object({ text: z.boolean(), image: z.boolean(), pdf: z.boolean() }),
  }),
  cost: z.object({
    input: z.number(),   // $/1K tokens
    output: z.number(),
  }),
  limit: z.object({
    context: z.number(),  // context window
    output: z.number(),   // max output tokens
  }),
})

7.3 인증 해결 순서

  1. 환경변수 (OPENAI_API_KEY 등)
  2. Auth Store (OAuth 토큰)
  3. 플러그인 인증 로더 (Codex OAuth, Copilot OAuth)
  4. 설정 파일
  5. .well-known/opencode 원격 설정
14

Overview §8 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • // packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
  • export namespace BusEvent {
  • export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
  • type: Type, properties: Properties
  • ) {
  • registry.set(type, { type, properties })
  • return { type, properties }
  • }
  • // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  • export function payloads() {
  • return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
  • registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>

Topics covered

    1. 이벤트 버스 시스템
    1. 이벤트 버스 시스템
  • 8.1 Zod 타입 이벤트 정의
  • 8.2 인스턴스 로컬 + 글로벌 전파

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달
  GlobalBus.emit("event", { directory: Instance.directory, payload })
}

Main analysis

8. Event Bus System

8. Event Bus System

8.1 Zod type event definition

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}

8.2 Instance local + global propagation

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달
  GlobalBus.emit("event", { directory: Instance.directory, payload })
}

Event types: session.updated, message.updated, permission.asked, permission.replied, mcp.tools.changed, worktree.ready, server.instance.disposed, etc.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

8. 이벤트 버스 시스템

8. 이벤트 버스 시스템

8.1 Zod 타입 이벤트 정의

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type, properties: Properties
  ) {
    registry.set(type, { type, properties })
    return { type, properties }
  }

  // discriminated union으로 모든 이벤트의 타입 안전한 union 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}

8.2 인스턴스 로컬 + 글로벌 전파

// packages/140_opencode/src/bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  // 1. 인스턴스 로컬 구독자에게 전달
  for (const sub of state().subscriptions.get(def.type) ?? []) {
    sub(payload)
  }
  // 2. 글로벌 버스로 전파 → SSE로 프론트엔드에 전달
  GlobalBus.emit("event", { directory: Instance.directory, payload })
}

이벤트 유형: session.updated, message.updated, permission.asked, permission.replied, mcp.tools.changed, worktree.ready, server.instance.disposed 등.

15

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  return Bun.serve({
    hostname: opts.hostname,
    port: opts.port,
    fetch: app.fetch,
    websocket: websocket,  // PTY용 WebSocket
    idleTimeout: 0,
  })
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
.use(async (c, next) => {
  const directory = c.req.query("directory") ||
    c.req.header("x-opencode-directory") || process.cwd()
  return Instance.provide({
    directory: Filesystem.resolve(directory),
    init: InstanceBootstrap,
    async fn() { return next() }
  })
})

Main analysis

9. Server architecture

9. Server architecture

9.1 Hono HTTP Server

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  return Bun.serve({
    hostname: opts.hostname,
    port: opts.port,
    fetch: app.fetch,
    websocket: websocket,  // PTY용 WebSocket
    idleTimeout: 0,
  })
}

9.2 Route structure

path Role
/global Health check, global event, settings, exit
/session Session CRUD, Chat, Message Management
/project Project Management
/pty Pseudo-Terminal (WebSocket)
/config Settings Management
/provider AI provider management
/permission Permission request/response
/mcp MCP Server Management
/experimental tools, worktree, workspace

9.3 Instance context middleware

All requests are bound to a project instance via the directory header/query:

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
.use(async (c, next) => {
  const directory = c.req.query("directory") ||
    c.req.header("x-opencode-directory") || process.cwd()
  return Instance.provide({
    directory: Filesystem.resolve(directory),
    init: InstanceBootstrap,
    async fn() { return next() }
  })
})

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

9. 서버 아키텍처

9. 서버 아키텍처

9.1 Hono HTTP 서버

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
export function listen(opts) {
  const app = createApp(opts)
  return Bun.serve({
    hostname: opts.hostname,
    port: opts.port,
    fetch: app.fetch,
    websocket: websocket,  // PTY용 WebSocket
    idleTimeout: 0,
  })
}

9.2 라우트 구조

경로 역할
/global 헬스체크, 전역 이벤트, 설정, 종료
/session 세션 CRUD, 채팅, 메시지 관리
/project 프로젝트 관리
/pty 의사 터미널 (WebSocket)
/config 설정 관리
/provider AI 프로바이더 관리
/permission 권한 요청/응답
/mcp MCP 서버 관리
/experimental 도구, worktree, workspace

9.3 인스턴스 컨텍스트 미들웨어

모든 요청은 directory 헤더/쿼리를 통해 프로젝트 인스턴스에 바인딩된다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/server/server.ts
.use(async (c, next) => {
  const directory = c.req.query("directory") ||
    c.req.header("x-opencode-directory") || process.cwd()
  return Instance.provide({
    directory: Filesystem.resolve(directory),
    init: InstanceBootstrap,
    async fn() { return next() }
  })
})

Overview §10

000_overview/00_oc_overview.md

Overview

Overview §10 — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

    1. 원격 .well-known/opencode — 조직 기본값
    1. 글로벌 설정 — ~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json
    1. 커스텀 설정 — OPENCODE_CONFIG 환경변수 경로
    1. 프로젝트 설정 — opencode.json (프로젝트 루트)
    1. .opencode/ 디렉토리 — agents, commands, plugins, skills
    1. 인라인 설정 — OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT 환경변수
    1. 관리형 설정 — 엔터프라이즈 전용 (/etc/opencode, /Library/Application Support/opencode)
  • // packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
  • function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  • const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  • // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  • if (target.plugin && source.plugin)

Topics covered

    1. Configuration 시스템
    1. Configuration 시스템
  • 10.1 6단계 Configuration 계층 (낮은 → 높은 우선순위)
  • 10.2 주요 Configuration 항목

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin && source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — Info 스키마 (발췌)
export const Info = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),           // 기본 모델
  small_model: ModelId.optional(),     // 경량 모델
  default_agent: z.string().optional(),
  agent: z.record(Agent).optional(),   // 에이전트별 설정
  provider: z.record(Provider).optional(),
  mcp: z.record(Mcp).optional(),       // MCP 서버 설정
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  plugin: z.string().array().optional(),
  instructions: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  snapshot: z.boolean().optional(),
  compaction: z.object({
    auto: z.boolean().optional(),
    prune: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
  experimental: z.object({
    batch_tool: z.boolean().optional(),
    continue_loop_on_deny: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
})

Main analysis

10. Setting system

10. Setting system

10.1 6-level configuration hierarchy (low → high priority)

  1. Remote .well-known/opencode — Organization default
  2. Global Settings — ~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json
  3. Custom Settings — OPENCODE_CONFIG environment variable path
  4. Project Settings — opencode.json (project root)
  5. .opencode/ directory — agents, commands, plugins, skills
  6. Inline Settings — OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT environment variable
  7. Managed Settings — Enterprise only (/etc/opencode, /Library/Application Support/opencode)
// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin && source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}

10.2 Main setting items

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — Info 스키마 (발췌)
export const Info = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),           // 기본 모델
  small_model: ModelId.optional(),     // 경량 모델
  default_agent: z.string().optional(),
  agent: z.record(Agent).optional(),   // 에이전트별 설정
  provider: z.record(Provider).optional(),
  mcp: z.record(Mcp).optional(),       // MCP 서버 설정
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  plugin: z.string().array().optional(),
  instructions: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  snapshot: z.boolean().optional(),
  compaction: z.object({
    auto: z.boolean().optional(),
    prune: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
  experimental: z.object({
    batch_tool: z.boolean().optional(),
    continue_loop_on_deny: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
})

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

10. 설정 시스템

10. 설정 시스템

10.1 6단계 설정 계층 (낮은 → 높은 우선순위)

  1. 원격 .well-known/opencode — 조직 기본값
  2. 글로벌 설정 — ~/.config/140_opencode/opencode.json
  3. 커스텀 설정 — OPENCODE_CONFIG 환경변수 경로
  4. 프로젝트 설정 — opencode.json (프로젝트 루트)
  5. .opencode/ 디렉토리 — agents, commands, plugins, skills
  6. 인라인 설정 — OPENCODE_CONFIG_CONTENT 환경변수
  7. 관리형 설정 — 엔터프라이즈 전용 (/etc/opencode, /Library/Application Support/opencode)
// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 병합 로직
function mergeConfigConcatArrays(target, source) {
  const merged = mergeDeep(target, source)
  // plugin과 instructions 배열은 교체가 아니라 연결
  if (target.plugin && source.plugin)
    merged.plugin = Array.from(new Set([...target.plugin, ...source.plugin]))
  return merged
}

10.2 주요 설정 항목

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — Info 스키마 (발췌)
export const Info = z.object({
  model: ModelId.optional(),           // 기본 모델
  small_model: ModelId.optional(),     // 경량 모델
  default_agent: z.string().optional(),
  agent: z.record(Agent).optional(),   // 에이전트별 설정
  provider: z.record(Provider).optional(),
  mcp: z.record(Mcp).optional(),       // MCP 서버 설정
  permission: Permission.optional(),
  plugin: z.string().array().optional(),
  instructions: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
  snapshot: z.boolean().optional(),
  compaction: z.object({
    auto: z.boolean().optional(),
    prune: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
  experimental: z.object({
    batch_tool: z.boolean().optional(),
    continue_loop_on_deny: z.boolean().optional(),
  }).optional(),
})

Topics covered

    1. 권한 시스템
    1. 권한 시스템

Source code snippets

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
export const Request = z.object({
  id: PermissionID.zod,
  sessionID: SessionID.zod,
  permission: z.string(),       // "bash", "edit", "external_directory"
  patterns: z.string().array(), // ["rm *", "*.ts"]
  always: z.string().array(),   // "always" 규칙으로 승격 가능한 패턴
  tool: z.object({ messageID: MessageID.zod, callID: z.string() }).optional(),
})

export const Reply = z.enum(["once", "always", "reject"])

Main analysis

11. Permission system

11. Permission system

11.1 Wildcard pattern matching

Permission evaluation matches tool names and file patterns with wildcards:

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

11.2 Permission request/response flow

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
export const Request = z.object({
  id: PermissionID.zod,
  sessionID: SessionID.zod,
  permission: z.string(),       // "bash", "edit", "external_directory"
  patterns: z.string().array(), // ["rm *", "*.ts"]
  always: z.string().array(),   // "always" 규칙으로 승격 가능한 패턴
  tool: z.object({ messageID: MessageID.zod, callID: z.string() }).optional(),
})

export const Reply = z.enum(["once", "always", "reject"])

When ctx.ask() is called when running a tool, a permission.asked event is propagated to the frontend through the bus, and the user responds with once/always/reject.

11.3 Bash Command Arity

arity.ts provides a command dictionary to determine the risk of bash commands. For each command, it is used to determine “whether this command modifies a file.”

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 000_overview/00_oc_overview.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

11. 권한 시스템

11. 권한 시스템

11.1 Wildcard 패턴 매칭

권한 평가는 도구 이름과 파일 패턴을 wildcard로 매칭한다:

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
      && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

11.2 권한 요청/응답 플로우

// packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
export const Request = z.object({
  id: PermissionID.zod,
  sessionID: SessionID.zod,
  permission: z.string(),       // "bash", "edit", "external_directory"
  patterns: z.string().array(), // ["rm *", "*.ts"]
  always: z.string().array(),   // "always" 규칙으로 승격 가능한 패턴
  tool: z.object({ messageID: MessageID.zod, callID: z.string() }).optional(),
})

export const Reply = z.enum(["once", "always", "reject"])

도구 실행 시 ctx.ask()가 호출되면, permission.asked 이벤트가 버스를 통해 프론트엔드로 전파되고, 사용자가 once/always/reject로 응답한다.

11.3 Bash 명령 Arity

arity.ts는 bash 명령의 위험도를 판단하기 위한 명령어 사전을 제공한다. 각 명령에 대해 "이 명령이 파일을 수정하는가"를 판단하는 데 사용된다.

18

  • const OPENCODE_SKILL_PATTERN = "{skill,skills}/**/SKILL.md"
