README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:84-90
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:150-159
yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)

README / docs

// packages/plugin/src/tool.ts
export function tool<Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
  description: string
  args: Args
  execute(args: z.infer<z.ZodObject<Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise<string>
}) {
  return input
}
tool.schema = z  // Zod를 그대로 노출

README / docs

// packages/plugin/src/example.ts
import { Plugin } from "./index.js"
import { tool } from "./tool.js"

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {
  return {
    tool: {
      mytool: tool({
        description: "This is a custom tool",
        args: { foo: tool.schema.string().describe("foo") },
        async execute(args) {
          return `Hello ${args.foo}!`
        },
      }),
    },
  }
}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant P as Plugin.Service
    participant A as AuthHook
    participant O as OAuth Provider

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code
    A-->>U: URL + 코드 표시
    U->>O: 브라우저에서 코드 입력
    loop 폴링
        A->>O: access_token 요청
        O-->>A: authorization_pending / success
    end
    A-->>P: {refresh, access, expires}
    P->>A: auth.loader(getAuth, provider)
    A-->>P: {baseURL, apiKey, fetch}

README / docs

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269
yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)

README / docs

// packages/plugin/src/index.ts:214-217
export type ProviderHook = {
  id: string
  models?: (provider: ProviderV2, ctx: ProviderHookContext) => Promise<Record<string, ModelV2>>
}

Main analysis

OpenCode plugin system analysis

Analysis snapshot: 141_opencode-current/ — plugin system.

OpenCode's plugin is a Hook-based extension model. A plugin is a pure TypeScript function that implements the Hooks interface. Upon initialization, it receives PluginInput (SDK client, project path, Bun shell, etc.) and returns a Hooks object. This Hook object is inserted into almost all extension points of the runtime, including chat, tools, shell, and authentication.

The key is the trigger pattern. When calling Plugin.trigger(hookName, input, output), the corresponding hooks of all registered plugins are executed sequentially, and the results are manipulated by directly mutating the output object. This pattern is wrapped in Effect-TS's Effect.fn wrapper, so tracing and dependency injection are applied automatically.

The SDK package (@opencode-ai/plugin, 1.3.2) consists of three files: Hook type definition (index.ts), custom tool builder (tool.ts), and Bun shell type (shell.ts). The runtime core (packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts) declares Plugin.Service with the Effect-TS ServiceMap pattern and manages the plugin state for each session with InstanceState. Built-in plugins (CodexAuth, CopilotAuth, GitlabAuth, PoeAuth) are imported directly, and external plugins are installed by npm or dynamically loaded to the file:// local path.

graph TD
    A["opencode.json<br/>plugin: [...]"] --> B["Config.loadPlugin()"]
    B --> C["Plugin.Service (Effect-TS)"]
    D["내장 플러그인<br/>Codex·Copilot·GitLab·Poe"] --> C
    E[".opencode/plugins/*.ts<br/>로컬 플러그인"] --> B
    F["npm 패키지<br/>BunProc.install()"] --> C

    C --> G["InstanceState&lt;Hooks[]&gt;"]
    G --> H["Plugin.trigger()"]
    H --> I["chat.message"]
    H --> J["chat.params / chat.headers"]
    H --> K["tool.execute.before / after"]
    H --> L["shell.env"]
    H --> M["permission.ask"]
    H --> N["experimental.*"]

    G --> O["Bus.subscribeAll()"]
    O --> P["hook.event()"]

    G --> Q["ToolRegistry"]
    Q --> R["hook.tool → 커스텀 도구"]

Hook system details

Full list of Hooks interfaces

The hooks defined by the Hooks interface (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:162-248) are:

hook name Signature pattern call location Role
event ({event}) → void Bus.subscribeAll Receive all Bus events
config (Config) → void After initialization is complete Current settings notification
tool {[id]: ToolDefinition} ToolRegistry Custom tool registration
auth AuthHook object Authentication system Provides OAuth/API authentication
chat.message (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1338 Convert when new message is received
chat.params (input, output) → void llm.ts:131 Modulation of LLM parameters (temperature, etc.)
chat.headers (input, output) → void llm.ts:150 LLM request header injection
permission.ask (input, output) → void permission system Automatically approve/deny permission requests
command.execute.before (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1946 Before executing the slash command
tool.execute.before (input, output) → void prompt.ts:824 Modify args before executing tool
tool.execute.after (input, output) → void prompt.ts:845 Tampering with the results after running the tool
tool.definition (input, output) → void registry.ts:185 Tool Tips/Parameter Modulation
shell.env (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1699, bash.ts:162 Shell environment variable injection
experimental.chat.messages.transform (input, output) → void prompt.ts:673, compaction.ts:204 Convert entire message array
experimental.chat.system.transform (input, output) → void agent.ts:339 Convert system prompt
experimental.session.compacting (input, output) → void compaction.ts:169 Customizing the compaction prompt
experimental.text.complete (input, output) → void processor.ts:323 Post-processing after text creation is complete

There are a total of 17 hook slots, and since each key of the tool hook is an independent tool, there are more actual expansion points.

How the trigger pattern works

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})

Key design principles:

  1. Output Mutation Pattern: Each hook directly modifies the output object. Rather than returning a new object, it overwrites the properties of the existing object. This allows multiple plug-ins to process the same output sequentially.
  2. TriggerName type filter: Only hooks with the signature (input, output) => Promise<void> can be called with trigger(). Non-standard signature hooks such as event, config, tool, and auth are called in a separate path.
  3. Effect-TS wrapping: OpenTelemetry tracing and dependency injection are automatically applied by wrapping with Effect.fn.

Plugin life cycle

Step 1: Gather Settings

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}

Plugin sources are collected from three places:

Source Priority Format
global opencode.json Lowest npm package name or file://
global .opencode/plugins/ middle *.ts, *.js files
local opencode.json High npm package name or file://
local .opencode/plugins/ Best *.ts, *.js files

Deduplication (deduplicatePlugins) is based on canonical names, with higher priority winning.

Step 2: Reset

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:84-90
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}
  1. Directly import and initialize 4 built-in plugins (Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe)
  2. External plugin: npm package is dynamically imported after installation with BunProc.install(), file:// is imported immediately
  3. Prevention of duplication: default export and named export can point to the same function, so dedup with Set
  4. config notification: Call hook.config?.(cfg) after all hooks are finished loading.

Step 3: Subscribe to events

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:150-159
yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)

Make a wildcard subscription with Bus.subscribeAll to deliver all Bus events to the plugin's event hook. It is automatically released when the scope ends with Effect-TS's acquireRelease.

Step 4: Runtime triggers

When the caller calls something like Plugin.trigger("chat.params", input, output), all registered hooks are executed sequentially to mutate the output.

Custom Tool System

tool() builder in the SDK

// packages/plugin/src/tool.ts
export function tool<Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
  description: string
  args: Args
  execute(args: z.infer<z.ZodObject<Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise<string>
}) {
  return input
}
tool.schema = z  // Zod를 그대로 노출

Just declare parameters with the Zod schema and return a string from execute. ToolContext includes sessionID, messageID, agent, directory, worktree, abort signal, metadata() callback, and ask() permission request.

Example plugin

// packages/plugin/src/example.ts
import { Plugin } from "./index.js"
import { tool } from "./tool.js"

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {
  return {
    tool: {
      mytool: tool({
        description: "This is a custom tool",
        args: { foo: tool.schema.string().describe("foo") },
        async execute(args) {
          return `Hello ${args.foo}!`
        },
      }),
    },
  }
}

Runtime registration path

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}

ToolRegistry collects custom tools through two paths:

  1. File-based: Automatically detects ToolDefinition exported from .opencode/{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts} files.
  2. Plugin-based: Tools registered in the Hooks.tool dictionary.

All custom tools have a limited output length via Truncate.output().

Authentication plugin architecture

AuthHook is the most complex hook in the plugin system. Two authentication methods are supported:

method Description Example
oauth Device flow or PKCE OAuth Codex (OpenAI), Copilot (GitHub)
api Enter API key directly General Provider

loader returns a custom fetch function and baseURL based on authentication information. The Copilot plugin (copilot.ts) distinguishes user/agent requests with the x-initiator header and displays vision requests with the Copilot-Vision-Request header. The Codex plugin (codex.ts) obtains tokens with OpenAI PKCE OAuth + local HTTP server (port 1455).

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant P as Plugin.Service
    participant A as AuthHook
    participant O as OAuth Provider

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code
    A-->>U: URL + 코드 표시
    U->>O: 브라우저에서 코드 입력
    loop 폴링
        A->>O: access_token 요청
        O-->>A: authorization_pending / success
    end
    A-->>P: {refresh, access, expires}
    P->>A: auth.loader(getAuth, provider)
    A-->>P: {baseURL, apiKey, fetch}

Technical Reference

Module structure

file size Role
packages/plugin/src/index.ts 6.7KB SDK: Plugin, Hooks, AuthHook, PluginInput type definition
packages/plugin/src/tool.ts 1KB SDK: tool() builder + ToolContext + Zod exposure
packages/plugin/src/shell.ts 3KB SDK: BunShell type (Bun $ template tag)
packages/plugin/src/example.ts 0.4KB Example plugin
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts 8.2KB Runtime: Service definition, loading, trigger, Bus integration
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/codex.ts 20.5KB Built-in: OpenAI Codex PKCE OAuth authentication
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/copilot.ts 12.6KB Built-in: GitHub Copilot Device Flow OAuth Authentication

Effect-TS integration pattern

The OpenCode plugin leverages the following patterns from Effect-TS:

  • ServiceMap.Service: Dependency injection is possible by declaring Plugin.Service as an Effect service.
  • Layer.effect: Wraps the service implementation in a layer and allows mock replacement during testing.
  • InstanceState: Manage isolated plug-in state by session (instance)
  • Effect.acquireRelease: Ensures automatic cleanup of Bus subscriptions.
  • Effect.fn: Apply automatic tracing to trigger function

Comparison with Codex (Rust) plugin

Item OpenCode (TypeScript) Codex (Rust)
expansion unit Hooks object (set of functions) manifest + MCP server + connector package
Installation npm install or local file marketplace + git sync
Certification Integration with AuthHook in plugin OAuth is a separate system
Tool registration Hooks.tool + tool() builder MCP Server Tool Exposure
Runtime integration trigger pattern (output mutation) developer instructions injection
State Management Effect-TS InstanceState PluginsManager 67KB single manager
Distribution npm registry OpenAI curated marketplace

Fork Perspective

  • The output mutation model of the [x] trigger pattern is simple yet powerful — it can be directly adopted in our extension design.
  • The Zod integration of the tool() builder is a good reference for type-safe tool definitions.
  • Effect-TS Automatic organization of subscriptions using acquireRelease is effective in preventing resource leaks
  • Bun runtime dependencies (BunProc.install, Bun.$) need to be replaced in the Node.js environment.
  • Built-in authentication plugins (Codex, Copilot) are service-specific – can be abstracted into a general-purpose OAuth framework
  • There are as many as 6 experimental.* prefix hooks — risk of API change upon stabilization

List of core files

  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/index.ts — SDK type definition
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/tool.ts — Custom tool builder
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/shell.ts — BunShell type
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/example.ts — Example plugin
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts — Runtime core
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/codex.ts — Codex authentication plugin
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/copilot.ts — Copilot authentication plugin
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts — Custom tool registration
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — Loading plugin settings

Previous article: [[10_oc_memory]]
Next article: [[12_oc_guardian]]

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2026-03-26: In-depth reverse engineering enhancements — reverse-engineering tag added, document leaflet hook system classification tag expansion. The existing analysis is already based on source code, so the structure is maintained.
  • 2025-07-15: Analyzed the OpenCode plugin system as SDK + Runtime + Hook + Custom Tool + Authentication structure.

Latest update (2026-05-30)

Based on the previous commit 1522, the following changes were confirmed in the plugin system. SDK version is 1.15.12.

1. Add dispose hook — plugin cleanup lifecycle

A new hook, dispose?: () => Promise<void>, has been added to the Hooks interface (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:223, commit 519d3444). The runtime (packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269) sequentially calls dispose of all plugins when the instance scope ends through Effect.addFinalizer.

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269
yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)

In the previous document, the only resource release was acquireRelease of Bus.subscribeAll, but now the plugin's own cleanup (termination of WebSocket connection, deletion of temporary files, etc.) can be handled by dispose.

2. New provider hook type

The provider?: ProviderHook field was added to the Hooks interface (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:230). ProviderHook consists of id and models() callbacks and dynamically injects a list of models for each provider.

// packages/plugin/src/index.ts:214-217
export type ProviderHook = {
  id: string
  models?: (provider: ProviderV2, ctx: ProviderHookContext) => Promise<Record<string, ModelV2>>
}

At runtime, it iterates over the hook.provider of all plugins in packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts:1268-1293, and overwrites the returned model map with the provider's provider.models. Unlike the trigger() pattern, it is not an output mutation but a return value replacement method, so it is processed as a separate path.

3. Session Switcher plugin

The TUI built-in feature-plugin session/ was added with commit 8f8b161c (4 files, 819 lines). Conditionally loaded under the Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_SESSION_SWITCHER flag in internal.ts.

file Role
feature-plugins/session/index.tsx Keymap registration: session.list command, slash /sessions
feature-plugins/session/dialog.tsx Session list dialog (line 335)
feature-plugins/session/preview-pane.tsx Preview messages from selected session (line 382)
feature-plugins/session/util.tsx Time Format, Status Icon Utility

It can be accessed from both the command palette and slash commands (/sessions, /resume, /continue) using TuiPluginApi.keymap.registerLayer().

4. Fix dynamic MCP server disconnection

In commit c0bc020a, the state.config map was added to packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts. Fixed a bug where disconnection was missed during refresh because the server dynamically added with MCP.add() was not in config. Now the dynamic server is also tracked with s.config[clientName] and disconnected normally.

5. Built-in plugin expansion (4 → 9)

Cloudflare Workers, Cloudflare AI Gateway, Azure, DigitalOcean, and xAI were added to the existing 4 (Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe), making a total of 9 built-in authentication plugins (packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:67-82).

6. SDK structure changes

Item Previous Current
SDK version 1.3.2 1.15.12
Number of SDK files 3 (index, tool, shell) 6 (+tui.ts, example-workspace.ts, 61 tui-related types)
PluginInput client, project, directory, worktree, $ + experimental_workspace.register(), serverUrl
Separate PluginModule non-existence Separate server/tui entry points (PluginModule, TuiPluginModule)
Number of Hooks 17 19 (+dispose, +provider, +experimental.compaction.autocontinue)
Plugin loading Direct import + BunProc.install Separated into PluginLoader module (line 236, plan/resolve/load step 3)

7. experimental.compaction.autocontinue hook

The plugin can control whether to insert an automatic continue message after compaction is completed (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:315-325). If you set output.enabled to false, synthetic user turn will be omitted. The calling location is packages/140_opencode/src/session/compaction.ts:509-510.

8. TUI plugin API maturity

The TuiPluginApi type (packages/plugin/src/tui.ts) has been significantly expanded: keymap system (api.keymap), attention/notification system (api.attention), theme API (api.theme), KV storage (api.kv), slot system (api.ui.Slot), Lifecycle (api.lifecycle.onDispose), plugin manager (api.plugins.activate/deactivate/install). There are a total of 13 built-in TUI feature-plugins: home(2), sidebar(5), system(5), and session(1).

Add fork perspective

  • The dispose hook is required when a plugin holds external resources — the same pattern is adopted in our design as well.
  • The pattern of dynamically injecting a list of models with the provider hook is useful for supporting custom providers.
  • TUI plug-in API expands to 61 types — Risk of breaking change before stabilization
  • The three-step analysis (plan → resolve → load) of PluginLoader is robust, but complexity increases.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 011_plugin-system/11_oc_plugin.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

OpenCode 플러그인 시스템 분석

분석 스냅샷: 141_opencode-current/ — plugin system.

OpenCode의 플러그인은 Hook 기반 확장 모델이다. 플러그인은 Hooks 인터페이스를 구현한 순수 TypeScript 함수로, 초기화 시 PluginInput(SDK 클라이언트, 프로젝트 경로, Bun shell 등)을 받고 Hooks 객체를 반환한다. 이 Hook 객체가 채팅, 도구, 셸, 인증 등 런타임의 거의 모든 확장점에 끼어든다.

핵심은 trigger 패턴이다. Plugin.trigger(hookName, input, output) 호출 시 등록된 모든 플러그인의 해당 훅이 순차 실행되며, output 객체를 직접 변이(mutate)해서 결과를 조작한다. 이 패턴은 Effect-TS의 Effect.fn 래퍼로 감싸져 트레이싱과 의존성 주입이 자동으로 적용된다.

SDK 패키지(@opencode-ai/plugin, 1.3.2)는 세 파일로 구성된다: Hook 타입 정의(index.ts), 커스텀 도구 빌더(tool.ts), Bun 셸 타입(shell.ts). 런타임 코어(packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts)는 Effect-TS ServiceMap 패턴으로 Plugin.Service를 선언하고, InstanceState로 세션별 플러그인 상태를 관리한다. 내장 플러그인(CodexAuth, CopilotAuth, GitlabAuth, PoeAuth)은 직접 import하고, 외부 플러그인은 npm 설치 또는 file:// 로컬 경로로 동적 로딩한다.

graph TD
    A["opencode.json<br/>plugin: [...]"] --> B["Config.loadPlugin()"]
    B --> C["Plugin.Service (Effect-TS)"]
    D["내장 플러그인<br/>Codex·Copilot·GitLab·Poe"] --> C
    E[".opencode/plugins/*.ts<br/>로컬 플러그인"] --> B
    F["npm 패키지<br/>BunProc.install()"] --> C

    C --> G["InstanceState&lt;Hooks[]&gt;"]
    G --> H["Plugin.trigger()"]
    H --> I["chat.message"]
    H --> J["chat.params / chat.headers"]
    H --> K["tool.execute.before / after"]
    H --> L["shell.env"]
    H --> M["permission.ask"]
    H --> N["experimental.*"]

    G --> O["Bus.subscribeAll()"]
    O --> P["hook.event()"]

    G --> Q["ToolRegistry"]
    Q --> R["hook.tool → 커스텀 도구"]

Hook 시스템 상세

Hooks 인터페이스 전체 목록

Hooks 인터페이스(packages/plugin/src/index.ts:162-248)가 정의하는 훅은 다음과 같다:

훅 이름 시그니처 패턴 호출 위치 역할
event ({event}) → void Bus.subscribeAll 모든 Bus 이벤트 수신
config (Config) → void 초기화 완료 후 현재 설정 통지
tool {[id]: ToolDefinition} ToolRegistry 커스텀 도구 등록
auth AuthHook 객체 인증 시스템 OAuth/API 인증 제공
chat.message (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1338 새 메시지 수신 시 변환
chat.params (input, output) → void llm.ts:131 LLM 파라미터(temperature 등) 변조
chat.headers (input, output) → void llm.ts:150 LLM 요청 헤더 주입
permission.ask (input, output) → void 권한 시스템 권한 요청 자동 승인/거부
command.execute.before (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1946 슬래시 커맨드 실행 전
tool.execute.before (input, output) → void prompt.ts:824 도구 실행 전 args 변조
tool.execute.after (input, output) → void prompt.ts:845 도구 실행 후 결과 변조
tool.definition (input, output) → void registry.ts:185 도구 설명/파라미터 변조
shell.env (input, output) → void prompt.ts:1699, bash.ts:162 셸 환경변수 주입
experimental.chat.messages.transform (input, output) → void prompt.ts:673, compaction.ts:204 전체 메시지 배열 변환
experimental.chat.system.transform (input, output) → void agent.ts:339 시스템 프롬프트 변환
experimental.session.compacting (input, output) → void compaction.ts:169 컴팩션 프롬프트 커스터마이징
experimental.text.complete (input, output) → void processor.ts:323 텍스트 생성 완료 후 후처리

총 17개 훅 슬롯이며, tool 훅의 각 키가 독립 도구이므로 실질적 확장점은 이보다 많다.

trigger 패턴의 동작 원리

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:165-180
const trigger = Effect.fn("Plugin.trigger")(function* <
  Name extends TriggerName,
  Input = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[0],
  Output = Parameters<Required<Hooks>[Name]>[1],
>(name: Name, input: Input, output: Output) {
  if (!name) return output
  const state = yield* InstanceState.get(cache)
  yield* Effect.promise(async () => {
    for (const hook of state.hooks) {
      const fn = hook[name] as any
      if (!fn) continue
      await fn(input, output)  // output을 직접 변이
    }
  })
  return output  // 변이된 output 반환
})

핵심 설계 원칙:

  1. Output 변이(Mutation) 패턴: 각 훅은 output 객체를 직접 수정한다. 새 객체를 반환하는 게 아니라 기존 객체의 프로퍼티를 덮어쓴다. 이로써 여러 플러그인이 같은 output을 순차적으로 가공할 수 있다.
  2. TriggerName 타입 필터: (input, output) => Promise<void> 시그니처를 가진 훅만 trigger()로 호출 가능하다. event, config, tool, auth 같은 비표준 시그니처 훅은 별도 경로로 호출된다.
  3. Effect-TS 래핑: Effect.fn으로 감싸 OpenTelemetry 트레이싱과 의존성 주입이 자동 적용된다.

플러그인 라이프사이클

1단계: 설정 수집

// packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts:497-508
async function loadPlugin(dir: string) {
  const plugins: string[] = []
  for (const item of await Glob.scan("{plugin,plugins}/*.{ts,js}", {
    cwd: dir, absolute: true, dot: true, symlink: true,
  })) {
    plugins.push(pathToFileURL(item).href)
  }
  return plugins
}

플러그인 소스는 세 곳에서 수집된다:

소스 우선순위 형식
글로벌 opencode.json 최저 npm 패키지명 또는 file://
글로벌 .opencode/plugins/ 중간 *.ts, *.js 파일
로컬 opencode.json 높음 npm 패키지명 또는 file://
로컬 .opencode/plugins/ 최고 *.ts, *.js 파일

중복 제거(deduplicatePlugins)는 canonical 이름 기준으로, 높은 우선순위가 이긴다.

2단계: 초기화

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:84-90
for (const plugin of INTERNAL_PLUGINS) {
  log.info("loading internal plugin", { name: plugin.name })
  const init = await plugin(input).catch((err) => {
    log.error("failed to load internal plugin", { name: plugin.name, error: err })
  })
  if (init) hooks.push(init)
}
  1. 내장 플러그인 4개(Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe) 직접 import 후 초기화
  2. 외부 플러그인: npm 패키지는 BunProc.install()로 설치 후 동적 import, file://은 바로 import
  3. 중복 방지: default export와 named export가 같은 함수를 가리킬 수 있으므로 Set으로 dedup
  4. config 통지: 모든 훅 로딩 완료 후 hook.config?.(cfg) 호출

3단계: 이벤트 구독

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:150-159
yield* Effect.acquireRelease(
  Effect.sync(() =>
    Bus.subscribeAll(async (input) => {
      for (const hook of hooks) {
        hook["event"]?.({ event: input })
      }
    }),
  ),
  (unsub) => Effect.sync(unsub),
)

Bus.subscribeAll로 와일드카드 구독을 걸어 모든 Bus 이벤트를 플러그인의 event 훅으로 전달한다. Effect-TS의 acquireRelease로 scope 종료 시 자동 해제된다.

4단계: 런타임 트리거

호출자가 Plugin.trigger("chat.params", input, output)처럼 호출하면, 등록된 모든 훅이 순차 실행되어 output을 변이한다.

커스텀 도구 시스템

SDK의 tool() 빌더

// packages/plugin/src/tool.ts
export function tool<Args extends z.ZodRawShape>(input: {
  description: string
  args: Args
  execute(args: z.infer<z.ZodObject<Args>>, context: ToolContext): Promise<string>
}) {
  return input
}
tool.schema = z  // Zod를 그대로 노출

Zod 스키마로 파라미터를 선언하고, execute에서 문자열을 반환하면 된다. ToolContext에는 sessionID, messageID, agent, directory, worktree, abort 시그널, metadata() 콜백, ask() 권한 요청이 포함된다.

예제 플러그인

// packages/plugin/src/example.ts
import { Plugin } from "./index.js"
import { tool } from "./tool.js"

export const ExamplePlugin: Plugin = async (ctx) => {
  return {
    tool: {
      mytool: tool({
        description: "This is a custom tool",
        args: { foo: tool.schema.string().describe("foo") },
        async execute(args) {
          return `Hello ${args.foo}!`
        },
      }),
    },
  }
}

런타임 등록 경로

// packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts:61-83
function fromPlugin(id: string, def: ToolDefinition): Tool.Info {
  return {
    id,
    init: async (initCtx) => ({
      parameters: z.object(def.args),
      description: def.description,
      execute: async (args, toolCtx) => {
        const pluginCtx = {
          ...toolCtx,
          directory: ctx.directory,
          worktree: ctx.worktree,
        } as unknown as PluginToolContext
        const result = await def.execute(args as any, pluginCtx)
        const out = await Truncate.output(result, {}, initCtx?.agent)
        return {
          title: "",
          output: out.truncated ? out.content : result,
          metadata: { truncated: out.truncated },
        }
      },
    }),
  }
}

ToolRegistry는 두 경로로 커스텀 도구를 수집한다:

  1. 파일 기반: .opencode/{tool,tools}/*.{js,ts} 파일에서 export된 ToolDefinition 자동 발견
  2. 플러그인 기반: Hooks.tool 딕셔너리에서 등록된 도구

모든 커스텀 도구는 Truncate.output()을 거쳐 출력 길이가 제한된다.

인증 플러그인 아키텍처

AuthHook은 플러그인 시스템에서 가장 복잡한 훅이다. 두 가지 인증 방식을 지원한다:

방식 설명 예시
oauth Device flow 또는 PKCE OAuth Codex(OpenAI), Copilot(GitHub)
api API 키 직접 입력 일반 프로바이더

loader는 인증 정보를 기반으로 커스텀 fetch 함수와 baseURL을 반환한다. Copilot 플러그인(copilot.ts)은 x-initiator 헤더로 사용자/에이전트 요청을 구분하고, Copilot-Vision-Request 헤더로 비전 요청을 표시한다. Codex 플러그인(codex.ts)은 OpenAI PKCE OAuth + 로컬 HTTP 서버(포트 1455)로 토큰을 획득한다.

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant P as Plugin.Service
    participant A as AuthHook
    participant O as OAuth Provider

    U->>P: 인증 요청
    P->>A: auth.methods[0].authorize()
    A->>O: Device Code 요청
    O-->>A: verification_uri + user_code
    A-->>U: URL + 코드 표시
    U->>O: 브라우저에서 코드 입력
    loop 폴링
        A->>O: access_token 요청
        O-->>A: authorization_pending / success
    end
    A-->>P: {refresh, access, expires}
    P->>A: auth.loader(getAuth, provider)
    A-->>P: {baseURL, apiKey, fetch}

기술 참조

모듈 구조

파일 크기 역할
packages/plugin/src/index.ts 6.7KB SDK: Plugin, Hooks, AuthHook, PluginInput 타입 정의
packages/plugin/src/tool.ts 1KB SDK: tool() 빌더 + ToolContext + Zod 노출
packages/plugin/src/shell.ts 3KB SDK: BunShell 타입 (Bun $ 템플릿 태그)
packages/plugin/src/example.ts 0.4KB 예제 플러그인
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts 8.2KB 런타임: Service 정의, 로딩, trigger, Bus 연동
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/codex.ts 20.5KB 내장: OpenAI Codex PKCE OAuth 인증
packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/copilot.ts 12.6KB 내장: GitHub Copilot Device Flow OAuth 인증

Effect-TS 통합 패턴

OpenCode 플러그인은 Effect-TS의 다음 패턴을 활용한다:

  • ServiceMap.Service: Plugin.Service를 Effect 서비스로 선언해 의존성 주입 가능
  • Layer.effect: 서비스 구현을 Layer로 래핑해 테스트 시 mock 교체 가능
  • InstanceState: 세션(인스턴스)별 격리된 플러그인 상태 관리
  • Effect.acquireRelease: Bus 구독의 자동 정리(cleanup) 보장
  • Effect.fn: trigger 함수에 자동 트레이싱 적용

Codex(Rust) 플러그인과의 비교

항목 OpenCode (TypeScript) Codex (Rust)
확장 단위 Hooks 객체 (함수 집합) manifest + MCP 서버 + connector 패키지
설치 npm install 또는 로컬 파일 marketplace + git sync
인증 플러그인 내 AuthHook으로 통합 OAuth는 별도 시스템
도구 등록 Hooks.tool + tool() 빌더 MCP 서버 도구 노출
런타임 연동 trigger 패턴 (output 변이) developer instructions 주입
상태 관리 Effect-TS InstanceState PluginsManager 67KB 단일 매니저
배포 npm registry OpenAI curated marketplace

포크 관점

  • trigger 패턴의 output 변이 모델은 단순하면서 강력하다 — 우리 확장 설계에 직접 채택 가능
  • tool() 빌더의 Zod 통합은 타입 안전한 도구 정의의 좋은 레퍼런스
  • Effect-TS acquireRelease를 이용한 구독 자동 정리는 리소스 누수 방지에 효과적
  • Bun 런타임 의존(BunProc.install, Bun.$)은 Node.js 환경에서 대체 필요
  • 내장 인증 플러그인(Codex, Copilot)은 특정 서비스 종속 — 범용 OAuth 프레임워크로 추상화 가능
  • experimental.* 접두사 훅이 6개나 됨 — 안정화 시 API 변경 위험

핵심 파일 목록

  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/index.ts — SDK 타입 정의
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/tool.ts — 커스텀 도구 빌더
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/shell.ts — BunShell 타입
  • 140_opencode/packages/plugin/src/example.ts — 예제 플러그인
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts — 런타임 코어
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/codex.ts — Codex 인증 플러그인
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/copilot.ts — Copilot 인증 플러그인
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/registry.ts — 커스텀 도구 등록
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts — 플러그인 설정 로딩

이전 문서: [[10_oc_memory]]
다음 문서: [[12_oc_guardian]]

snapshot_to_current 델타

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

변경 기록

  • 2026-03-26: 역공학 심화 보강 — reverse-engineering 태그 추가, 문서 전단 훅 시스템 분류 태그 확장. 기존 분석은 이미 소스코드 기반이므로 구조 유지.
  • 2025-07-15: OpenCode 플러그인 시스템을 SDK + 런타임 + Hook + 커스텀 도구 + 인증 구조로 분석했다.

최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)

직전 1522 커밋 기준으로 플러그인 시스템에 다음 변경이 확인되었다. SDK 버전은 1.15.12.

1. dispose 훅 추가 — 플러그인 정리 라이프사이클

Hooks 인터페이스에 dispose?: () => Promise<void> 훅이 신설되었다 (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:223, 커밋 519d3444). 런타임(packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269)은 Effect.addFinalizer를 통해 인스턴스 scope 종료 시 모든 플러그인의 dispose를 순차 호출한다.

// packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:258-269
yield* Effect.addFinalizer(() =>
  Effect.forEach(
    hooks,
    (hook) =>
      Effect.tryPromise({
        try: () => Promise.resolve(hook.dispose?.()),
        catch: (error) => {
          log.error("plugin dispose hook failed", { error })
        },
      }).pipe(Effect.ignore),
    { discard: true },
  ),
)

이전 문서에서 리소스 해제는 Bus.subscribeAll의 acquireRelease뿐이었으나, 이제 플러그인 자체 정리(WebSocket 연결 종료, 임시 파일 삭제 등)를 dispose에서 처리할 수 있다.

2. provider 훅 타입 신설

Hooks 인터페이스에 provider?: ProviderHook 필드가 추가되었다 (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:230). ProviderHook은 id와 models() 콜백으로 구성되며, 프로바이더별 모델 목록을 동적으로 주입한다.

// packages/plugin/src/index.ts:214-217
export type ProviderHook = {
  id: string
  models?: (provider: ProviderV2, ctx: ProviderHookContext) => Promise<Record<string, ModelV2>>
}

런타임에서는 packages/140_opencode/src/provider/provider.ts:1268-1293에서 모든 플러그인의 hook.provider를 순회하며, 반환된 모델 맵을 해당 프로바이더의 provider.models에 덮어쓴다. trigger() 패턴과 달리 output 변이가 아니라 반환값 교체 방식이므로 별도 경로로 처리된다.

3. 세션 전환기 플러그인 (Session Switcher)

커밋 8f8b161c로 TUI 내장 feature-plugin session/이 추가되었다 (4개 파일, 819줄). internal.ts에서 Flag.OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL_SESSION_SWITCHER 플래그 하에 조건부 로딩된다.

파일 역할
feature-plugins/session/index.tsx keymap 등록: session.list 커맨드, slash /sessions
feature-plugins/session/dialog.tsx 세션 목록 다이얼로그 (335줄)
feature-plugins/session/preview-pane.tsx 선택된 세션의 메시지 미리보기 (382줄)
feature-plugins/session/util.tsx 시간 포맷, 상태 아이콘 유틸

TuiPluginApi.keymap.registerLayer()를 사용해 커맨드 팔레트와 slash 커맨드(/sessions, /resume, /continue) 양쪽에서 접근 가능하다.

4. 동적 MCP 서버 연결 해제 수정

커밋 c0bc020a에서 packages/140_opencode/src/mcp/index.ts에 state.config 맵이 추가되었다. MCP.add()로 동적 추가된 서버가 config에는 없어 리프레시 시 연결 해제가 누락되던 버그를 수정했다. 이제 동적 서버도 s.config[clientName]으로 추적되어 정상 disconnect된다.

5. 내장 플러그인 확장 (4개 → 9개)

기존 4개(Codex, Copilot, GitLab, Poe)에서 Cloudflare Workers, Cloudflare AI Gateway, Azure, DigitalOcean, xAI가 추가되어 총 9개 내장 인증 플러그인이 되었다 (packages/140_opencode/src/plugin/index.ts:67-82).

6. SDK 구조 변경

항목 이전 현재
SDK 버전 1.3.2 1.15.12
SDK 파일 수 3개 (index, tool, shell) 6개 (+tui.ts, example-workspace.ts, tui 관련 타입 61개)
PluginInput client, project, directory, worktree, $ + experimental_workspace.register(), serverUrl
PluginModule 분리 미존재 server/tui 엔트리포인트 분리 (PluginModule, TuiPluginModule)
Hooks 수 17개 19개 (+dispose, +provider, +experimental.compaction.autocontinue)
플러그인 로딩 직접 import + BunProc.install PluginLoader 모듈로 분리 (236줄, plan/resolve/load 3단계)

7. experimental.compaction.autocontinue 훅

컴팩션 완료 후 자동 continue 메시지 삽입 여부를 플러그인이 제어할 수 있다 (packages/plugin/src/index.ts:315-325). output.enabled를 false로 설정하면 synthetic user turn이 생략된다. 호출 위치는 packages/140_opencode/src/session/compaction.ts:509-510.

8. TUI 플러그인 API 성숙

TuiPluginApi 타입(packages/plugin/src/tui.ts)이 대폭 확장되었다: keymap 시스템(api.keymap), attention/notification 시스템(api.attention), 테마 API(api.theme), KV 스토리지(api.kv), 슬롯 시스템(api.ui.Slot), 라이프사이클(api.lifecycle.onDispose), 플러그인 매니저(api.plugins.activate/deactivate/install). 내장 TUI feature-plugin은 home(2), sidebar(5), system(5), session(1) 총 13개다.

포크 관점 추가

  • dispose 훅은 플러그인이 외부 리소스를 보유할 때 필수 — 우리 설계에도 동일 패턴 채택
  • provider 훅으로 모델 목록을 동적 주입하는 패턴은 커스텀 프로바이더 지원에 유용
  • TUI 플러그인 API가 61개 타입으로 팽창 — 안정화 전 breaking change 위험
  • PluginLoader의 3단계 해석(plan → resolve → load)은 견고하나 복잡도 상승
36

Axis 12: Guardian & approval

AXIS

012_guardian-approval/12_oc_guardian.md

Overview

Axis 12: Guardian & approval — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 분석 스냅샷: 141_opencode-current/ — guardian and approval.

  • OpenCode의 permission 시스템은 Codex의 guardian과 완전히 다른 설계 철학을 갖는다. Codex가 별도 LLM 세션(gpt-5.4)으로 위험도를 자동 평가하는 반면, OpenCode는 규칙 기반 평가 엔진으로 동작한다. LLM 호출 없이 wildcard 패턴 매칭과 ruleset 우선순위만으로 allow/deny/ask를 결정하고, ask일 때 Effect.ts의 Deferred로 사용자 응
    1. 규칙 평가: tool call 발생 시 permission + pattern을 config/session/agent ruleset에 대해 findLast 매칭
    1. Deferred 대기: ask 결정이면 Deferred를 생성하고 Bus 이벤트로 TUI에 통지, 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
    1. 일괄 해소: always 승인 시 동일 세션의 대기 중인 다른 요청도 자동 재평가해서 일괄 승인
  • graph TD
  • A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
  • B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
  • C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
  • C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
  • C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
  • F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]

Topics covered

  • 핵심 모듈 구조
  • 규칙 스키마
  • Config.Permission — Configuration 레벨
  • Permission.Rule — Runtime 레벨
  • 평가 엔진
  • evaluate() — 15줄의 핵심
  • Wildcard 매칭
  • BashArity — 명령어 정규화
  • Deferred Approval 흐름
  • ask() — 대기 생성
  • reply() — Approval 처리
  • 일괄 Approval (batch-approve)
  • 일괄 거부 (batch-reject)
  • 에러 체계

Source code snippets

README / docs

graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]

README / docs

// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)

README / docs

// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})

README / docs

// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

README / docs

// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}

README / docs

// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}

README / docs

// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})

README / docs

sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end

README / docs

// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}

README / docs

// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}

README / docs

// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})

README / docs

// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set<string> {
  const result = new Set<string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" && rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}

Main analysis

OpenCode permission/approval system analysis

Analysis snapshot: 141_opencode-current/ — guardian and approval.

OpenCode's permission system has a completely different design philosophy than Codex's guardian. While Codex automatically evaluates risk in a separate LLM session (gpt-5.4), OpenCode operates as a rule-based assessment engine. Allow/deny/ask is determined only by wildcard pattern matching and ruleset priority without calling LLM, and when asking, asynchronously waits for user response with Deferred in Effect.ts.

The structure has three steps:

  1. Rule evaluation: When a tool call occurs, match permission + pattern to config/session/agent ruleset with findLast
  2. Wait for Deferred: If ask is decided, Deferred is created and notified to TUI through Bus event, blocking until user response.
  3. Batch resolution: When always approved, other pending requests in the same session are automatically re-evaluated and approved in batches.
graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]

Core module structure

file size Role
schema.ts Line 17 PermissionID branded type (Effect.ts Newtype + Identifier)
evaluate.ts Line 15 Pure function: matches ruleset array with findLast, default ask
arity.ts Line 163 Dictionary of "human-understandable units" of token counts for bash commands
index.ts line 322 Permission namespace: Service layer, Deferred management, Bus events, config transformation

Rule schema

Config.Permission — Configuration level

In the configuration file, permissions are set to allow | deny | Ask or receive detailed objects for each pattern.

// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)

The shorthand notation "allow" is normalized to { "*": "allow" } in permissionTransform. To preserve the original key order, we use the __originalKeys preprocess trick.

Permission.Rule — Runtime level

// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})

Config.Permission → Permission.Ruleset(Rule[]) conversion is handled by Permission.fromConfig(). The ~/ path expands to os.homedir().

Evaluation Engine

evaluate() — the gist of line 15

// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

Design features:

  • findLast priority: Rules at the back of the array override the ones at the front. If you stack in the order config → agent → session, session has the highest priority.
  • Double matching: Matches both permission name and pattern with wildcard. Wildcard.match tests regular expressions after converting *→.*, ?→.
  • Default ask: Ask user if no rule matches (fail-to-ask, not fail-open)
  • ruleset merge: Merge agent and session rulesets with Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission ?? []) and then evaluate

Wildcard matching

// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}

The "npm *" pattern matches both "npm" alone and "npm install react". Optional handling of trailing wildcards is key.

BashArity — Command normalization

When the bash tool requests permission, it abbreviates it to “human-understandable units” instead of the full command.

// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}

Action example:

  • npm run dev → arity dictionary "npm run": 3 → ["npm", "run", "dev"] (3 tokens)
  • git checkout main → "git": 2 → ["git", "checkout"] (2 tokens)
  • docker compose up -d → "docker compose": 3 → ["docker", "compose", "up"]

This normalized prefix is used for permission pattern matching. If you allow "npm run *", both npm run dev and npm run build are allowed.

Deferred approval flow

ask() — create wait

// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})

Deferred is a one-time asynchronous value in Effect.ts. It is waiting with await and is immediately resolved when succeed or fail is called. When the session ends, the finalizer fails all pending Deferred with RejectedError.

reply() — Approval processing

sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end

batch-approve

The most interesting behavior occurs in the always response:

// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}

With one always approval:

  1. Add new rule to approved array
  2. Re-evaluate all pending requests in the same session
  3. Automatically resolve requests allowed with new rules

Example: bash + "npm *" always approved → All waiting npm install and npm test automatically pass.

batch-reject

There is a similar batch for reject:

// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}

reject collectively rejects all pending requests for the session. If the user rejects one, everything waiting in the same session is rejected.

Error system

error class trigger Meaning
DeniedError evaluate → deny Explicitly blocked by rule. contains ruleset information
RejectedError user reject / end session User declines or session ends
CorrectedError reject + message Provide feedback message when user rejects

All are defined as Effect.ts TaggedErrorClass, so branch processing is possible with Effect.catchTag. The feedback of CorrectedError is used to convey the instruction to the LLM, “Do this, not this.”

Tool integration

Each tool accesses the permission system through ctx.ask():

// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})

The separation of patterns and always is important. patterns is a matching target for the current request, and always is a pattern that will be permanently added to the ruleset when "always" is approved. In the case of edit, patterns is the exact file name and always is a glob pattern, so "approve this file" expands to "approve this entire directory".

disabled() — Disable tool

// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set<string> {
  const result = new Set<string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" && rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}

Editing tools such as write, apply_patch, and multiedit are all integrated into the "edit" permission. edit: "deny" disables all editing tools.

Permanence

Permission state is stored in two places:

  1. SessionTable.permission: Ruleset for each session, JSON column (Permission.Ruleset type)
  2. PermissionTable: Permanent permission per project, project_id PK + data JSON column

always permissions are only added to the approved array at runtime, and are persisted in the PermissionTable when the session ends. In the next session, initial approval is restored in PermissionTable.

Comparison with Codex guardian

Item Codex (guardian) OpenCode (permission)
Judgment subject LLM (gpt-5.4) Rules engine (wildcard matching)
Judgment criteria risk_score (0-100) ruleset findLast
Default policy fail-closed (passed to user) fail-to-ask (ask user)
Automatic approval conditions risk_score < 80 rule.action === "allow"
cost LLM call (token consumption) zero (local rule evaluation)
Context transcript restoration required Not necessary
batch processing None (judgment per request) always resolved in bulk upon approval
Feedback None Passing Feedback to LLM with CorrectedError
runtime Rust (Codex-RS) TypeScript + Effect.ts

Fork Perspective

  • Rule-based + LLM call-free is cost-effective and predictable
  • The findLast priority model naturally expresses the config → agent → session hierarchy.
  • Deferred-based asynchronous approval is a good use case for the Effect.ts ecosystem
  • always batch approval and reject batch rejection are effective in improving UX
  • BashArity normalization allows "npm run dev" and "npm run build" to be treated as a single pattern.
  • approved array can grow infinitely — no pruning strategy
  • wildcard pattern supports only * and no negation(!)
  • evaluate is an O(n) linear scan, so performance may deteriorate if the ruleset becomes large (not a realistic problem)

List of core files

  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/schema.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/arity.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/util/wildcard.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/config/config.ts (Permission schema)
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/session/session.sql.ts (PermissionTable)
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/server/routes/permission.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/bash.ts (using BashArity)

Previous article: [[11_oc_plugin]]
Next article: None

snapshot_to_current delta

Area Snapshot Current
Axis surface Paths cited in-body APIs/flags evolve per release — re-verify on upgrade
Host delegation Documented in this checkout Binary-only drift for closed-source CLIs

Change history

  • 2025-07-24: The OpenCode permission system was organized into a rule-based evaluation + Deferred asynchronous approval + batch processing structure.

Korean corpus (reference)

Verbatim KO corpus 012_guardian-approval/12_oc_guardian.md for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.

OpenCode 권한/승인 시스템 분석

분석 스냅샷: 141_opencode-current/ — guardian and approval.

OpenCode의 permission 시스템은 Codex의 guardian과 완전히 다른 설계 철학을 갖는다. Codex가 별도 LLM 세션(gpt-5.4)으로 위험도를 자동 평가하는 반면, OpenCode는 규칙 기반 평가 엔진으로 동작한다. LLM 호출 없이 wildcard 패턴 매칭과 ruleset 우선순위만으로 allow/deny/ask를 결정하고, ask일 때 Effect.ts의 Deferred로 사용자 응답을 비동기 대기한다.

구조는 3단계다:

  1. 규칙 평가: tool call 발생 시 permission + pattern을 config/session/agent ruleset에 대해 findLast 매칭
  2. Deferred 대기: ask 결정이면 Deferred를 생성하고 Bus 이벤트로 TUI에 통지, 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
  3. 일괄 해소: always 승인 시 동일 세션의 대기 중인 다른 요청도 자동 재평가해서 일괄 승인
graph TD
    A["tool call 발생"] --> B["evaluate(permission, pattern, rulesets)"]
    B -->|findLast matching| C{action?}
    C -->|allow| D["즉시 실행"]
    C -->|deny| E["DeniedError"]
    C -->|ask| F["Deferred 생성 + Bus.publish"]
    F --> G["TUI에 승인 요청 표시"]
    G -->|once| H["Deferred.succeed → 실행"]
    G -->|always| I["ruleset에 추가 + 대기 중 요청 일괄 재평가"]
    G -->|reject| J["Deferred.fail → RejectedError"]
    J --> K["같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject"]

핵심 모듈 구조

파일 크기 역할
schema.ts 17줄 PermissionID branded type (Effect.ts Newtype + Identifier)
evaluate.ts 15줄 순수 함수: ruleset 배열을 findLast로 매칭, 기본값 ask
arity.ts 163줄 bash 명령어의 "사람이 이해할 수 있는 단위" 토큰 수 사전
index.ts 322줄 Permission namespace: Service layer, Deferred 관리, Bus 이벤트, config 변환

규칙 스키마

Config.Permission — 설정 레벨

설정 파일에서 permission은 도구별로 allow | deny | ask 또는 패턴별 상세 객체를 받는다.

// config/config.ts — Config.Permission 스키마
export const Permission = z.preprocess(
  permissionPreprocess,
  z.object({
    read: PermissionRule.optional(),    // "allow" | { "src/*": "allow", "secret/*": "deny" }
    edit: PermissionRule.optional(),
    bash: PermissionRule.optional(),
    task: PermissionRule.optional(),
    external_directory: PermissionRule.optional(),
    doom_loop: PermissionAction.optional(),
    // ... 16개 도구 카테고리
  })
  .catchall(PermissionRule)
  .or(PermissionAction),  // 단축: "allow" 하나로 전체 적용
)

단축 표기 "allow"는 permissionTransform에서 { "*": "allow" }로 정규화된다. 원래 키 순서를 보존하기 위해 __originalKeys preprocess 트릭을 쓴다.

Permission.Rule — 런타임 레벨

// permission/index.ts
export const Rule = z.object({
  permission: z.string(),  // "bash", "edit", "read", "external_directory" 등
  pattern: z.string(),     // wildcard 패턴: "npm *", "src/**", "*"
  action: z.enum(["allow", "deny", "ask"]),
})

Config.Permission → Permission.Ruleset(Rule[]) 변환은 Permission.fromConfig()가 담당한다. ~/ 경로는 os.homedir()으로 확장된다.

평가 엔진

evaluate() — 15줄의 핵심

// permission/evaluate.ts
export function evaluate(permission: string, pattern: string, ...rulesets: Rule[][]): Rule {
  const rules = rulesets.flat()
  const match = rules.findLast(
    (rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission)
              && Wildcard.match(pattern, rule.pattern),
  )
  return match ?? { action: "ask", permission, pattern: "*" }
}

설계 특징:

  • findLast 우선순위: 배열 뒤쪽 규칙이 앞쪽을 override한다. config → agent → session 순서로 쌓으면 session이 최우선
  • 이중 매칭: permission 이름과 pattern 모두 wildcard로 매칭. Wildcard.match는 *→.*, ?→. 변환 후 정규식 테스트
  • 기본값 ask: 일치하는 규칙이 없으면 사용자에게 묻는다 (fail-open이 아닌 fail-to-ask)
  • ruleset 병합: Permission.merge(agent.permission, session.permission ?? [])로 agent와 session 룰셋을 합친 뒤 evaluate

Wildcard 매칭

// util/wildcard.ts
export function match(str: string, pattern: string) {
  let escaped = pattern
    .replace(/[.+^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&")
    .replace(/\*/g, ".*")
    .replace(/\?/g, ".")
  // "ls *" → "ls" 와 "ls -la" 모두 매칭
  if (escaped.endsWith(" .*")) {
    escaped = escaped.slice(0, -3) + "( .*)?"
  }
  return new RegExp("^" + escaped + "$", flags).test(str)
}

"npm *" 패턴은 "npm" 단독과 "npm install react" 모두에 매칭된다. trailing wildcard의 optional 처리가 핵심이다.

BashArity — 명령어 정규화

bash 도구가 permission을 요청할 때, 전체 명령어 대신 "사람이 이해할 수 있는 단위"로 축약한다.

// permission/arity.ts
export namespace BashArity {
  export function prefix(tokens: string[]) {
    for (let len = tokens.length; len > 0; len--) {
      const prefix = tokens.slice(0, len).join(" ")
      const arity = ARITY[prefix]
      if (arity !== undefined) return tokens.slice(0, arity)
    }
    if (tokens.length === 0) return []
    return tokens.slice(0, 1)
  }
}

동작 예시:

  • npm run dev → arity 사전에 "npm run": 3 → ["npm", "run", "dev"] (3토큰)
  • git checkout main → "git": 2 → ["git", "checkout"] (2토큰)
  • docker compose up -d → "docker compose": 3 → ["docker", "compose", "up"]

이렇게 정규화된 prefix가 permission pattern 매칭에 사용된다. "npm run *"을 allow하면 npm run dev, npm run build 모두 허용.

Deferred 승인 흐름

ask() — 대기 생성

// permission/index.ts — ask 함수 (핵심 로직)
const ask = Effect.fn("Permission.ask")(function* (input) {
  const { approved, pending } = yield* InstanceState.get(state)
  let needsAsk = false

  for (const pattern of request.patterns) {
    const rule = evaluate(request.permission, pattern, ruleset, approved)
    if (rule.action === "deny") return yield* new DeniedError({ ruleset: ... })
    if (rule.action === "allow") continue
    needsAsk = true
  }

  if (!needsAsk) return

  const deferred = yield* Deferred.make<void, RejectedError | CorrectedError>()
  pending.set(id, { info, deferred })
  void Bus.publish(Event.Asked, info)
  return yield* Deferred.await(deferred)  // 사용자 응답까지 블로킹
})

Deferred는 Effect.ts의 일회성 비동기 값이다. await로 대기하고 있다가 succeed 또는 fail이 호출되면 즉시 해소된다. 세션 종료 시 finalizer가 모든 pending Deferred를 RejectedError로 fail한다.

reply() — 승인 처리

sequenceDiagram
    participant Tool as Tool (bash/edit/read)
    participant Perm as Permission.Service
    participant Bus as Bus (EventEmitter)
    participant TUI as TUI (Ink)

    Tool->>Perm: ctx.ask({ permission: "bash", patterns: ["npm run dev"] })
    Perm->>Perm: evaluate → action: "ask"
    Perm->>Perm: Deferred.make() + pending.set()
    Perm->>Bus: Bus.publish(Event.Asked, request)
    Bus->>TUI: permission.asked 이벤트
    TUI->>TUI: 승인 UI 표시

    alt once
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "once" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.succeed()
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else always
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "always" })
        Perm->>Perm: approved.push(rule)
        Perm->>Perm: 다른 pending 재평가 → 일괄 승인
        Perm->>Tool: resume execution
    else reject
        TUI->>Perm: Permission.reply({ reply: "reject" })
        Perm->>Perm: Deferred.fail(RejectedError)
        Perm->>Perm: 같은 세션 모든 pending 일괄 reject
        Perm->>Tool: throw RejectedError
    end

일괄 승인 (batch-approve)

always 응답 시 가장 흥미로운 동작이 발생한다:

// permission/index.ts — reply "always" 경로
for (const pattern of existing.info.always) {
  approved.push({
    permission: existing.info.permission,
    pattern,
    action: "allow",
  })
}

// 같은 세션의 다른 pending 요청을 재평가
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  const ok = item.info.patterns.every(
    (pattern) => evaluate(item.info.permission, pattern, approved).action === "allow",
  )
  if (!ok) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.succeed(item.deferred, undefined)
}

한 번의 always 승인으로:

  1. approved 배열에 새 규칙 추가
  2. 동일 세션의 모든 pending 요청을 재평가
  3. 새 규칙으로 allow되는 요청을 자동 해소

예: bash + "npm *" always 승인 → 대기 중이던 npm install, npm test 모두 자동 통과.

일괄 거부 (batch-reject)

reject 시에도 비슷한 일괄 처리가 있다:

// reject 시 같은 세션의 모든 pending 일괄 거부
for (const [id, item] of pending.entries()) {
  if (item.info.sessionID !== existing.info.sessionID) continue
  pending.delete(id)
  yield* Deferred.fail(item.deferred, new RejectedError())
}

reject는 해당 세션의 모든 pending 요청을 일괄 거부한다. 사용자가 하나를 거부하면 같은 세션에서 대기 중인 모든 것이 거부된다.

에러 체계

에러 클래스 트리거 의미
DeniedError evaluate → deny 규칙에 의해 명시적으로 차단. ruleset 정보 포함
RejectedError 사용자 reject / 세션 종료 사용자가 거부하거나 세션이 종료됨
CorrectedError reject + message 사용자가 거부하면서 피드백 메시지 제공

모두 Effect.ts TaggedErrorClass로 정의되어 있어 Effect.catchTag로 분기 처리 가능하다. CorrectedError의 feedback은 LLM에게 "이렇게 하지 말고 이렇게 해라"는 지시를 전달하는 데 사용된다.

도구 통합

각 도구는 ctx.ask()를 통해 permission 시스템에 접근한다:

// tool/bash.ts — bash 도구의 permission 요청
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "bash",
  patterns: Array.from(patterns),    // BashArity로 정규화된 명령어
  always: Array.from(always),        // "always" 승인 시 저장할 패턴
  metadata: {},
})

// tool/edit.ts — 편집 도구
await ctx.ask({
  permission: "edit",
  patterns: [relativePath],          // 파일 경로
  always: [relativeGlob],           // glob 패턴으로 확장
  metadata: {},
})

patterns와 always의 분리가 중요하다. patterns는 현재 요청에 대한 매칭 대상이고, always는 "always" 승인 시 ruleset에 영구 추가될 패턴이다. edit의 경우 patterns는 정확한 파일명, always는 glob 패턴이어서 "이 파일 승인"이 "이 디렉토리 전체 승인"으로 확장된다.

disabled() — 도구 비활성화

// permission/index.ts
export function disabled(tools: string[], ruleset: Ruleset): Set<string> {
  const result = new Set<string>()
  for (const tool of tools) {
    const permission = EDIT_TOOLS.includes(tool) ? "edit" : tool
    const rule = ruleset.findLast((rule) => Wildcard.match(permission, rule.permission))
    if (!rule) continue
    if (rule.pattern === "*" && rule.action === "deny") result.add(tool)
  }
  return result
}

write, apply_patch, multiedit 등 편집 도구는 모두 "edit" permission으로 통합된다. edit: "deny"면 모든 편집 도구가 비활성화.

영속성

permission 상태는 두 곳에 저장된다:

  1. SessionTable.permission: 세션별 룰셋, JSON 컬럼 (Permission.Ruleset 타입)
  2. PermissionTable: 프로젝트별 영구 승인, project_id PK + data JSON 컬럼

always 승인은 런타임 approved 배열에만 추가되고, 세션이 끝나면 PermissionTable에 영속화되는 구조다. 다음 세션에서는 PermissionTable에서 초기 approved를 복원한다.

Codex guardian과의 비교

항목 Codex (guardian) OpenCode (permission)
판단 주체 LLM (gpt-5.4) 규칙 엔진 (wildcard 매칭)
판단 기준 risk_score (0-100) ruleset findLast
기본 정책 fail-closed (사용자에게 넘김) fail-to-ask (사용자에게 묻기)
자동 승인 조건 risk_score < 80 rule.action === "allow"
비용 LLM 호출 (토큰 소모) 제로 (로컬 규칙 평가)
컨텍스트 transcript 복원 필요 불필요
배치 처리 없음 (요청별 판단) always 승인 시 일괄 해소
피드백 없음 CorrectedError로 LLM에 피드백 전달
런타임 Rust (Codex-RS) TypeScript + Effect.ts

포크 관점

  • 규칙 기반 + LLM 무호출은 비용 효율적이고 예측 가능하다
  • findLast 우선순위 모델은 config → agent → session 계층을 자연스럽게 표현한다
  • Deferred 기반 비동기 승인은 Effect.ts 생태계의 좋은 활용 사례
  • always 일괄 승인과 reject 일괄 거부는 UX 개선에 효과적
  • BashArity 정규화는 "npm run dev"와 "npm run build"를 하나의 패턴으로 처리할 수 있게 한다
  • approved 배열이 무한 성장할 수 있다 — 정리 전략이 없음
  • wildcard 패턴이 *만 지원하고 negation(!)이 없다
  • evaluate가 O(n) 선형 스캔이라 ruleset이 커지면 성능 저하 가능 (현실적 문제는 아님)

핵심 파일 목록

  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/evaluate.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/arity.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/permission/index.ts
  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/util/wildcard.ts

  • 140_opencode/packages/140_opencode/src/tool/bash.ts (BashArity 활용)

37

Axis 13: Cross-cutting

AXIS

013_etc/13_oc_etc.md

Overview

Axis 13: Cross-cutting — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:

  • 이 문서는 OpenCode 코딩 에이전트에서 1~12차원(TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian)에 포함되지 않는 **잔여 교차 관심사(cross-cutting concerns)**를 분석한다. OpenCode는 packages/140_opencode/src/ 아래에 40개 이상의 하위 디렉터리를 갖
  • packages/140_opencode/src/
  • acp/ -- Agent Client Protocol (접근 제어)
  • auth/ -- 인증/크리덴셜 관리
  • bun/ -- Bun 런타임 추상화
  • bus/ -- 이벤트 버스 (핵심 고유 기능)
  • effect/ -- Effect-TS 인프라 계층
  • env/ -- 환경변수 격리
  • flag/ -- 피처 플래그 시스템
  • git/ -- Git VCS 통합
  • ide/ -- IDE 통합
  • lsp/ -- Language Server Protocol 클라이언트

Topics covered

  • 개요
  • 분석 대상 디렉터리 맵
    1. Git/VCS Integration
  • 1.1 핵심 파일
  • 1.2 Git 서비스 Architecture
  • 1.3 Git 인터페이스
  • 1.4 Worktree 시스템
  • 1.5 Diff 전략
    1. 모델 라우팅 / 프로바이더 추상화
  • 2.1 핵심 파일
  • 2.2 번들된 프로바이더 (21개)
  • 2.3 커스텀 로더 시스템

export interface Interface {
  readonly run: (args: string[], opts: Options) => Effect.Effect<Result>
  readonly branch: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect<string | undefined>
  readonly defaultBranch: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect<Base | undefined>
  readonly hasHead: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect<boolean>
  readonly mergeBase: (cwd: string, base: string, head?: string) => Effect.Effect<string | undefined>
  readonly show: (cwd: string, ref: string, file: string) => Effect.Effect<string>
  readonly status: (cwd: string) => Effect.Effect<Item[]>
  readonly diff: (cwd: string, ref: string) => Effect.Effect<Item[]>
  readonly stats: (cwd: string, ref: string) => Effect.Effect<Stat[]>
}

// 이름 충돌 방지: 최대 26회 시도
const MAX_NAME_ATTEMPTS = 26
const candidate = Effect.fn("Worktree.candidate")(function* (root, base?) {
  for (const attempt of Array.from({ length: MAX_NAME_ATTEMPTS }, (_, i) => i)) {
    const name = base ? (attempt === 0 ? base : `${base}-${Slug.create()}`) : Slug.create()
    // ... 존재 확인 및 브랜치 참조 확인
  }
})

// src/provider/models.ts
export const Data = lazy(async () => {
  const result = await Filesystem.readJson(filepath).catch(() => {})
  if (result) return result
  const snapshot = await import("./models-snapshot.js")  // 빌드 타임 스냅샷
  if (snapshot) return snapshot
  const json = await fetch(`${url()}/api.json`)          // 런타임 페치
  return JSON.parse(json)
})

export const Model = z.object({
  id: z.string(),
  name: z.string(),
  reasoning: z.boolean(),        // 추론 모드 지원
  tool_call: z.boolean(),        // 도구 호출 지원
  interleaved: z.union([...]),   // 인터리브드 사고
  cost: z.object({               // 토큰당 비용
    input: z.number(),
    output: z.number(),
    cache_read: z.number().optional(),
  }),
  limit: z.object({
    context: z.number(),         // 컨텍스트 윈도우
    output: z.number(),          // 최대 출력 토큰
  }),
  modalities: z.object({         // 입출력 모달리티
    input: z.array(z.enum(["text", "audio", "image", "video", "pdf"])),
    output: z.array(z.enum(["text", "audio", "image", "video", "pdf"])),
  }),
})

    make: (id: string) => schema.makeUnsafe(id),
    opencode: schema.makeUnsafe("opencode"),
    anthropic: schema.makeUnsafe("anthropic"),
    // ... 11개 well-known 프로바이더

export type ParsedAPICallError =
  | { type: "context_overflow"; message: string }  // 컨텍스트 초과
  | { type: "api_error"; message: string; isRetryable: boolean }  // 일반 API 에러

// 15개 이상의 오버플로우 패턴 매칭
const OVERFLOW_PATTERNS = [
  /prompt is too long/i,                    // Anthropic
  /exceeds the context window/i,            // OpenAI
  /maximum prompt length is \d+/i,          // xAI (Grok)
  /context[_ ]length[_ ]exceeded/i,         // 일반 폴백
  // ... 11개 추가 패턴
]

README / docs

// Effect.catch: 포괄적 에러 캐치 (git 프로세스 실패 등)
Effect.catch((err) => Effect.succeed(fail(err)))

// Effect.catchCause: Cause 기반 에러 처리
Effect.catchCause((cause) => {
  log.error("cleanup loop failed", { cause: Cause.pretty(cause) })
  return Effect.void
})

// Scope 기반 포크된 에러 처리
yield* boot(info, input?.startCommand).pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((cause) => Effect.sync(() => log.error(...))),
  Effect.forkIn(scope),  // 스코프 내에서 백그라운드 실행
)

README / docs

// provider.ts - SSE 읽기 타임아웃 보호
function wrapSSE(res: Response, ms: number, ctl: AbortController) {
  const reader = res.body.getReader()
  const body = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async pull(ctrl) {
      const part = await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const id = setTimeout(() => {
          const err = new Error("SSE read timed out")
          ctl.abort(err)
          void reader.cancel(err)
          reject(err)
        }, ms)
        reader.read().then(
          (part) => { clearTimeout(id); resolve(part) },
          (err) => { clearTimeout(id); reject(err) },
        )
      })
    },
  })
}

README / docs

export function parseStreamError(input: unknown): ParsedStreamError | undefined {
  switch (body?.error?.code) {
    case "context_length_exceeded":     // 컨텍스트 초과
    case "insufficient_quota":          // 쿼터 초과
    case "usage_not_included":          // 플랜 업그레이드 필요
    case "invalid_prompt":              // 잘못된 프롬프트
  }
}

README / docs

export namespace Log {
  export const Level = z.enum(["DEBUG", "INFO", "WARN", "ERROR"])

  // 출력 형식: "LEVEL ISO8601 +deltaMs key=value ... message"
  // 예: "INFO  2026-03-26T10:30:00 +42ms service=git branch"

  export function create(tags?: Record<string, any>): Logger {
    // 서비스별 싱글턴 캐싱
    const service = tags["service"]
    if (service) {
      const cached = loggers.get(service)
      if (cached) return cached
    }
    // ...
  }
}

README / docs

// time() 메서드: using 문과 결합 가능
time(message: string, extra?: Record<string, any>) {
  const now = Date.now()
  result.info(message, { status: "started", ...extra })
  return {
    stop() {
      result.info(message, { status: "completed", duration: Date.now() - now, ...extra })
    },
    [Symbol.dispose]() { this.stop() },
  }
}

README / docs

const SUPPORTED_IDES = [
  { name: "Windsurf",                       cmd: "windsurf" },
  { name: "Visual Studio Code - Insiders",  cmd: "code-insiders" },
  { name: "Visual Studio Code",             cmd: "code" },
  { name: "Cursor",                         cmd: "cursor" },
  { name: "VSCodium",                       cmd: "codium" },
]

README / docs

export function ide() {
  if (process.env["TERM_PROGRAM"] === "vscode") {
    const v = process.env["GIT_ASKPASS"]
    for (const ide of SUPPORTED_IDES) {
      if (v?.includes(ide.name)) return ide.name
    }
  }
  return "unknown"
}

README / docs

export async function install(ide) {
  const p = await Process.run([cmd, "--install-extension", "sst-dev.opencode"], { nothrow: true })
}

// 1. XDG 디렉터리 격리 (각 프로세스별 임시 디렉터리)
const dir = path.join(os.tmpdir(), "opencode-test-data-" + process.pid)

// 2. 환경변수 클리닝 (모든 프로바이더 키 삭제)
delete process.env["ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"]
delete process.env["OPENAI_API_KEY"]
// ... 15개 이상의 키 삭제

// 3. 인메모리 SQLite
process.env["OPENCODE_DB"] = ":memory:"

// 4. 정리: GC + 재시도 (EBUSY 방지, 특히 Windows)
afterAll(async () => {
  Database.close()
  const rm = async (left: number): Promise<void> => {
    Bun.gc(true)
    await sleep(100)
    return fs.rm(dir, { recursive: true, force: true }).catch(...)
  }
  await rm(30)  // 최대 30회 재시도
})

// 파일 기반 저장 (0o600 권한)
const file = path.join(Global.Path.data, "auth.json")

const set = Effect.fn("Auth.set")(function* (key, info) {
  const data = yield* all()
  yield* Effect.tryPromise({
    try: () => Filesystem.writeJson(file, { ...data, [norm]: info }, 0o600),
    catch: fail("Failed to write auth data"),
  })
})

README / docs

// bus-event.ts
export namespace BusEvent {
  const registry = new Map<string, Definition>()

  export function define<Type extends string, Properties extends ZodType>(
    type: Type,
    properties: Properties,
  ) {
    const result = { type, properties }
    registry.set(type, result)
    return result
  }

  // discriminatedUnion으로 전체 이벤트 스키마 생성
  export function payloads() {
    return z.discriminatedUnion("type",
      registry.entries().map(([type, def]) =>
        z.object({ type: z.literal(type), properties: def.properties })
      ).toArray()
    )
  }
}

// bus/index.ts
export async function publish(def, properties) {
  const payload = { type: def.type, properties }
  const pending = []
  for (const key of [def.type, "*"]) {      // 타입 매칭 + 와일드카드
    const match = state().subscriptions.get(key)
    for (const sub of match) {
      pending.push(sub(payload))
    }
  }
  GlobalBus.emit("event", {                 // 글로벌 버스로 전파
    directory: Instance.directory,
    payload,
  })
  return Promise.all(pending)
}

README / docs

// bus/global.ts
export const GlobalBus = new EventEmitter<{
  event: [{ directory?: string; payload: any }]
}>()

README / docs

const state = Instance.state(
  () => ({
    subscriptions: new Map<any, Subscription[]>(),
  }),
  async (entry) => {
    // 인스턴스 종료 시 InstanceDisposed 이벤트 발행
    const wildcard = entry.subscriptions.get("*")
    for (const sub of wildcard) {
      sub({ type: InstanceDisposed.type, properties: { directory: Instance.directory } })
    }
  },
)

graph TD
    subgraph "이벤트 버스 아키텍처"
        A[BusEvent.define] -->|등록| B[이벤트 레지스트리]
        C[Bus.publish] -->|타입 매칭| D[구독자 콜백]
        C -->|와일드카드| E["* 구독자"]
        C -->|전파| F[GlobalBus]
        F -->|크로스 인스턴스| G[다른 Instance]
    end

    subgraph "이벤트 흐름"
        H[세션/도구/LSP] -->|publish| C
        D --> I[TUI 업데이트]
        D --> J[서버 SSE]
        D --> K[상태 동기화]
    end
